faqs.question: What are the benefits of pursuing PGDM from NTPC School of Business?
faqs.answer:
PGDM full form is Post Graduate Diploma in Management which is a two-year programme offered by top management B-schools in India. PGDM courses are considered an alternative to an MBA and are looked upon with equality in the management industry. Students can also check the list of reasons below to pursue the PGDM course from NTPC School of Business:
Personality development: PGDM courses provide in-depth knowledge to students and upgrade them according to market trends. It also develops their personality and prepares them to enter the industry.
Networking opportunities: PGDM courses train future leaders. Nowadays, companies undertake several training programmes for their employees to make them better professionals.
High remuneration: PGDM courses are in high demand as they help in shaping the careers of the freshers and enable them to get placement at good packages. 
Career opportunities: The scope of PGDM students is very bright as this course enables them to enter various industries and find employment with top multinational companies.   
Developing leadership qualities: The syllabus of PGDM courses is designed by industry experts to create future leaders as per the current market needs.

faqs.question: Are admissions to various courses open at NTPC School of Business?
faqs.answer: NTPC School of Business admissions are based on merit considering other factors such as Personal Assessment (PA)/Final Composite Scores (FCS). Candidates are selected for courses based on their entrance exam scores/merit. Aspirants can apply online on the official website of the college. Interested candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can fill out the form.

faqs.question: Who can apply for PGDM at NTPC School of Business?
faqs.answer:
Candidate who meet the last educational qualification can apply for PGDM course atNTPC School of Business. For details, students can check the points mentioned below:
The candidates must have a minimum three years Bachelor’s degree, such as BBA/BE/BTech/BSc/BCom/CA/ICWA etc., or any other equivalent degree, with at least 50% aggregate. In case, of candidates belonging to Scheduled Caste (SC)/Scheduled Tribes (ST) or Differently Abled Person (DAP) category, this is relaxed to 45% from a recognised board or university.
Candidates appearing for final year bachelor’s degree/equivalent qualification examination can also apply
All candidates must also have a valid CAT / XAT / GMAT/ Other Management Score

faqs.question: How is life at NTPC School of Business?
faqs.answer:
NTPC School of Business provides the best infrastructure such as in-house facilities on twin sharing basis within the campus and recreation facilities. They also have well-equipped and modern classrooms with wifi.
The infrastructure is provided and supported by NTPC, with great lecture halls and hostel facilities. NSB also offers a huge library and access to top-notch books and literature. The quality of food in the mess and medical facilities are pretty good.
 Faculty: The teaching staff comprises a mix of IIM A professors, industry experts, and NSB faculty. The teaching pedagogy is as followed in IIM A, and rest assured, the faculty members are brilliant. The subjects like oil and gas, electricity generation, transmission and distribution, etc., are taught by industry experts, while finance is predominantly taught by IIM A faculty.
 Other: I chose this college primarily because it's a specialised course and is better than NTPC. It can provide end-to-end knowledge in the field of energy.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programme offered at NTPC School of Business is PGDM in Energy Management. NSB’s energy management course is designed to enrich management learning and practice at all levels of decision making in the energy domain. This includes deep insights about concepts, practices and skills to pursue a career in the continually evolving energy sector.
At the end of the programme, students are prepared to reflect the alignment between theoretical knowledge and practical scenario and bridge between classroom learning and real business challenges. Check the popular programmes offered at NSB Noida in the table provided below:

placements.overview:
NTPC School of Business offers placement assistance to students. NSB is conducting its placement drive for the batch passing out in 2023. As per the latest report, the institute recorded 100% placements for the class of 2023. Over 25 recruiters participated in the placement process and placed students in new-age job roles.

The top recruiters of NTPC School of Business in 2023 included NTPC, PwC, Bain & Company, EY, Deloitte, KPMG, Mercados, etc. Check the NTPC School of Business Noida placement statistics 2023 in the table provided below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the PG level, NTPC School of Business Noida offers two-year PGDM and 18-month Executive MBA courses to students. The college also offers full-time and part-time MBA courses to students. In addition to this, NSB also offers Doctoral level courses to students. Candidates can check the NTPC School of Business courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    The MBA course fee at NTPC School of Business is INR 16 lakh. Apart from the MBA course fee the candidate also have to pay one-time fee which is INR 30,000. The total tuition fee is INR 16.30 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
faqs.question: What is the MBA course fee at NTPC School of Business?

The application fee at NSB for PGDM (Energy Management) is INR 1,500 and PGDM (Executive) is INR 750. faqs.question: What are the general documents required for admission at NTPC School of Business?

faqs.answer: A:    There is no age limit to appear for CAT. The CAT exam is open for fresh graduates as well as working professionals. Since CAT is accepted by over 1300 B-schools across India for their full-time as well as executive MBA or online professional courses, a lot of working professionals appear for the CAT to pursue such courses. CAT score is accepted by Iims for full time MBA, executive MBA and FPM programmes. Other top MBA colleges in India also shortlist candidates for executive MBA or part-time MBA on the basis of CAT score. The minimum age limit for has to be 20 years as the minimum qualification for CAT exam graduation. Any candidate who has completed Graduation with 50 per cent aggregate (45 per cent for SC/ST candidates). Any candidate in final year of Bachelor's degree course can appear in CAT exam. Any candidate having a professional degree like CA/CS/ICWAI with a minimum of 50 per cent in aggregate.

reviews_list.batch_info: PGDM in Energy Management - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The placements are decent and focus solely on energy managerial roles.

review_content.Placements: 100% placements are there and 40 students get placed. The median salary is 12 LPA. Recruiting companies are NTPC, Adani Power, Suzlon Energy, and many more. 100% of students got internships in top energy companies like CERC, IEX, APPCPL, NTPC, and Lohum Batteries. Roles offered are business development, energy analyst, and energy manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, classrooms, industry expert sessions, and teachers are well-qualified. Good support from teachers is there for placements. Hostels are good enough with single accommodation for each student. It is fully air-conditioned and Wi-Fi is also enabled. You can be dissatisfied with the food served during dinner.

reviews_list.batch_info: PGDM in Energy Management - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It stands out from other energy management colleges.

review_content.Placements: The highest package offered in 2020 was 21 LPA, and the average package was 14 LPA (approximately). The current placements are going on, and the leading companies of energy and non-energy domains have come here to recruit students from the campus. More recruiters are coming every year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in the hostel, classrooms and library are top-notch. Food is very good. Medical facilities are readily available, and corporate insurance is provided for medical emergencies. The institute also has its own games room, swimming pool and all sorts of facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: PGDM in Energy Management - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for energy management.

review_content.Placements: The average package has consistently been around 11 LPA. The top recruiting companies include Deloitte, E&Y, Trident, KPMG, GE Power, NTPC etc. Being a new college, it has its own challenges. Things took a hit due to the pandemic. Despite everything, the college has been successful in placing all of its students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is provided and supported by NTPC, with great lecture halls and hostel facilities. NSB also offers a huge library and access to top-notch books and literature. The quality of food in the mess and medical facilities are pretty good.

reviews_list.batch_info: PGDM in Energy Management - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of NTPC School of Business.

review_content.Placements: We have rolling placements for the batch of 2021. The highest package was offered to 15 out of 23 students, and it is 13.9 LPA, and the average package for all the batches is between 10-12 LPA. Diverse companies come here and offer diverse roles to the students in internships and placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has newly constructed hostels. Housing and food are good. It has a world-class infrastructure compared with B-Schools. Classrooms are well-equipped for both online and offline classes.
review_content.Faculty: A majority of the core management courses are taught by renowned IIM-A professors. The curriculum is thoughtfully designed with a good blend of energy and management courses. All the professors are qualified, knowledgeable and helpful, and overall, the teaching quality is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: PGDM in Energy Management - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the faculty members and course.

review_content.Placements: The placement season is still going on. Currently, most of the students got placed in top companies like GE, Deloitte, Energy Exemplar, etc. The highest salary package offered is 14 LPA, and the average salary package offered is around 8 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good with wonderful surroundings. Expenses of the rooms are taken up by the hostel staff members. Food is prepared by ICH, and there is free high-speed Wi-Fi. Badminton, lawn tennis, volleyball, pool table and table tennis court are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: PGDM in Energy Management - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Best Energy Management Institute in India.

review_content.Placements: The placement process is quite vigorous and intends to provide the best opportunities to students. Students also receive various trainings during the course, which helps them to be Industry ready. The placement committee is very hardworking and ensures fair placement opportunities for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Infrastructure is good, and it is also equipped with all the necessary facilities for students. It also takes all the necessary precautions in present scenario of Covid, to ensure proper safety and improved health conditions. Overall the facilities is well maintained.

faqs.question: What is the PGDM Application procedure at NTPC School of Business?

faqs.answer: To get admission to a full-time PGDM course at NTPC School of Business, candidates must pass graduation with minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised university. The final selection procedure would be based on  Personal Assessment + Final Composite Scores. Aspirants need to qualify any one entrance exam with a valid score and submit their scores at the time of filling the application form.The Final selection is based on Final Composite Scores (FCS) that is calculated by using CS, Work Experience and PA scores.
faqs.question: How do I get into NTPC School of Business for PGDM course?

admission_process.title: NTPC School of Business Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Students can check detthe ailed NTPC School of Business Admission process infographic below:
NTPC School of Business admission process includes registration and application form evaluation. Candidates must follow the steps below to get a seat in the NTPC School of Business:
STEP 1: NTPC School of Business Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. The application fee at NSB for PGDM (Energy Management) is INR 1,500, and PGDM (Executive) is INR 750. Students can also check the detailedNTPC School of Business feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Students will be selected based on CAT /XAT/GMAT/Other Management Score/Personal Assessment (PA)/Final Composite Scores (FCS). The selection criteria for the PGDM course, i.e., PGDM- Energy Management and PGDM-Executive (self-sponsored) at NTPC School of Business is a two-step process. In the first step, students are short-listed for Personal Assessment (PA) from among the candidates who applied to the programme and who satisfy the eligibility criteria for the programme. The next step of final selection is based on the merit of Final Composite Scores (FCS).
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for PGDM admission at NTPC School of Business?
faqs.answer: For admission to a PGDM programme at NTPC School of Business, the aspirant must fulfill the course-specific eligibility criteria. Thus, only the aspirants who have passed a Bachelor's degree with a 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category) are eligible for admission. In addition, students should have passed the qualifying examination from a recognised board. Candidate must also hold the graduation mark sheet during application form filling and at the time of admission for verification purposes.

faqs.question: Is PGDM available at NTPC School of Business?
faqs.answer: Yes, the PGDM course is available at NTPC School of Business. The university offers PGDM courses at the PG level. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enrol for PGDM course admission set by the college. For the PGDM course, candidates must pass a bachelor's degree with a 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category).

faqs.question: What is the selection process for MBA at NTPC School of Business?
faqs.answer: The selection of the candidates for admission to the PGDM- Energy Management at NTPC School of Business is a two-step process which is Personal Assessment and Final Composite Scores. The CS score is calculated based on CAT / XAT / GMAT/ Other Management Score, Academic Performance. The applicants shortlisted for Personal Assessment (PA) on the basis of CS.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for admission to various courses at NTPC School of Business?
faqs.answer: NTPC School of Business admissions 2025 will begin soon. Till now, no schedule has been released by the college. Once the application portal is live, candidates can apply online for their preferred course. The business school offers PGDM courses at the PG level. To be admitted to the NTPC School of Business, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process at the NTPC School of Business is conducted online.

faqs.question: Are admissions to various courses open at NTPC School of Business?
faqs.answer: NTPC School of Business admissions are based on merit considering other factors such as Personal Assessment (PA)/Final Composite Scores (FCS). Candidates are selected for courses based on their entrance exam scores/merit. Aspirants can apply online on the official website of the college. Interested candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can fill out the form.

placement_data.title: NTPC School of Business Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: NTPC School of Business is conducting its placement drive for the batch passing out in 2023. As per the latest report, the institute recorded 100% placements for the class of 2023. The highest and average package offered during NTPC School of Business placements 2023 stood at INR 29 LPA and INR 12 LPA, respectively. Further, over 25 recruiters participated in the placement process and placed students in new-age job roles. The top recruiters of NTPC School of Business in 2023 included NTPC, PwC, Bain & Company, EY, Deloitte, KPMG, Mercados , etc. According to the latest report, 100% of students of the MBA/PGDM and Executive MBA/PGDM batch 2023 have been placed in reputed companies.
Check out the below video for information:

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered during NTPC School of Business placements?
faqs.answer: The placements are going on for the academic year 2022-2023. As of now, the highest package offered during NTPC School of Business placements 2023 stood at INR 29 LPA.

faqs.question: Is NTPC School of Business good for placements?
faqs.answer: In line to create future leaders in the field of the energy sector, NTPC School of Business offers its students 100 percent placement assistance. many firms of domestic and international repute have visited the NSB campus. Many of our students have gone on to work for formidable organizations such as Deloitte, KPMG, EY, and many more. They have been offered and are working in a variety of roles, ranging from analysts to consultants as well as executives. The placement facility of the college is really good, many renounced companies and other MNC's are invited by our placement cell for the campus placement. The package offered to the students are high and the placement percentage is also good.

reviews.review_heading: The placements are decent and focus solely on energy managerial roles.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, classrooms, industry expert sessions, and teachers are well-qualified. Good support from teachers is there for placements. Hostels are good enough with single accommodation for each student. It is fully air-conditioned and Wi-Fi is also enabled. You can be dissatisfied with the food served during dinner.

reviews.review_heading: It stands out from other energy management colleges.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the hostel, classrooms and library are top-notch. Food is very good. Medical facilities are readily available, and corporate insurance is provided for medical emergencies. The institute also has its own games room, swimming pool and all sorts of facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for energy management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is provided and supported by NTPC, with great lecture halls and hostel facilities. NSB also offers a huge library and access to top-notch books and literature. The quality of food in the mess and medical facilities are pretty good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NTPC School of Business.
reviews.review_text: The campus has newly constructed hostels. Housing and food are good. It has a world-class infrastructure compared with B-Schools. Classrooms are well-equipped for both online and offline classes.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members and course.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good with wonderful surroundings. Expenses of the rooms are taken up by the hostel staff members. Food is prepared by ICH, and there is free high-speed Wi-Fi. Badminton, lawn tennis, volleyball, pool table and table tennis court are available.

reviews.review_heading: Best Energy Management Institute in India.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure is good, and it is also equipped with all the necessary facilities for students. It also takes all the necessary precautions in present scenario of Covid, to ensure proper safety and improved health conditions. Overall the facilities is well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: NSB gave me the requisite industry exposure to be industry ready.
reviews.review_text: The college is located inside the PMI campus in Film City for the time being. The campus is equipped with modern technology. The food and lodging facilities are top-notch. Twin sharing air-conditioned rooms are available. The classrooms and hostels are at a distance of merely a 2-minute walk.

Noorul Islam University offers three-year BA, BCA, BCom, BE, BSc, BASLP, BBA, and other courses to students at the undergraduate level. Moreover, at the postgraduate level, Noorul Islam University offers one to two-year MCA, MSc, MBA, ME, and MA courses to students. The university also offers PG diploma and PhD courses to the students.
The flagship programme offered at Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education is the BE in various specialisations, including Software Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Biomedical Science & Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and others. The university provides this programme to students at the UG level. The university offers the BE programme for a duration of 4 years with a comprehensive curriculum. Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education courses strive to enhance students' learning experience to prepare them for the industry. faqs.question: Q: Is Noorul Islam Centre For Higher Education a good college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Indeed, one very famous institution is the Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education. It is a private institution based at Kumarakovil in Tamil Nadu, India. In 2008, the Ministry of Human Resource Development declared the Centre that was established in 1989 as a deemed university. The institution offers undergraduate and graduate studies in such fields as engineering, administration, science, and the arts. It holds an A+ grade rating and is NAAC accredited. It has established an impeccable reputation of high standards, highly professional teachers, cutting-edge technology, and superlative research. It is extensively involved with both domestic and international research ventures. Its student body is humongous and multidimensional:

faqs.answer: In order to take admission at NICHE, candidates must first register themselves. The registration process is outlined below:Step 1: Registration - Candidates must fill in all necessary details accurately. All future correspondence regarding their application will be sent to the email address and mobile number registered during this step.Step 2: Online Application - Candidates must provide all relevant details accurately before submitting their application. Upon submission, an application number will be generated, which should be kept for future reference.Step 3: Payment - The application fee is Rs. 500/- and is non-refundable. Candidates can make the payment through Netbanking, Credit/Debit card, or Paytm.Step 4: Payment Confirmation - If the payment amount has been debited during the transaction, candidates should wait for an hour to confirm the payment status on the same login page. If the amount has been debited more than once, it will be refunded to their account within 5 to 7 working days.

admission_process.title: Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education admission 2025is open for various courses. The university offers various courses such as BTech, BBA, MBA, ME, etc. The selection criteria are entrance-based, NICHE Entrance Exam followed by PI. To get admitted to NICHE, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD programme. The application process atNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Educationis conducted online. However, students can also collect the form from the university by visiting the campus. Read the article to know more aboutNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Educationcourse admission2025.

Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education admission is openfor various programmes. The university provides over 60 courses across multiple specialisations such as Engineering, Business Administration, Management etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. Students seeking to apply to the offered programmes can refer to the following table to learn aboutNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Education admission 2025highlights:
NICHE Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes offered
60+ courses including specialisations across various specialisations
Admission Status 2025
How to apply
https://admission.niuniv.net/portal/application-dept1.php?ref=

Download Now
Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education Prospectus 2025

Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education course admissionis completely entrance-based. Students seeking to apply for any of the courses offered at the university must fulfil the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying for it. Applicants need to register and appear for the accepted entrance exam before applying for the course. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Education courses:
NICHE Entrance Exam followed by PI

Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education admissionsis completely entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various course programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e., www.niuniv.com. The application fee is INR 500. However, candidates can also obtain the form from the university.
STEP 2: Selection

The university selects candidates based on university-level entrance exam scores, i.e., NICHE Entrance Exam followed by PI for various course admission. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theNoorul Islam Centre for Higher Education feeto confirm their seats at the university.

reviews.review_heading: The best university in the whole Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are unbelievable. They provide the needed equipment according to the courses. Classrooms are very decent. They also provide multi-specialty labs for animation students. The hostel is also well-maintained and beautifully maintained by staff.

reviews.review_heading: The college is amazing in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: Hostel food is amazing. Free Wi-Fi is available. College bus service is available. Administrative staffs and other working staffs are friendly. College libaray is large and has books according to every department. Every class is smart class. There is a separate building for labs.

reviews.review_heading: About Noorul Islam University.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-maintained infrastructure on college campus with Wi-Fi, labs, library, and it is an eco-friendly campus. Hostel and hostel food are not bad, but it varies among students because students from North India don't like those foods.

reviews.review_heading: This college is highly a good option for everyone.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our course are highlightable. This course has been moving a great demand for now and in future. Our department and our classrooms are well-equipped and labs and labs are well-settled and clean. Hostel is well-spacious and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Noorul Islam:The Walk Of Life
reviews.review_text: The overall  infrastructural area was impressive as it has a location on uphill and has wonderful view.The classrooms and labs are impressive as it was highly developed for out studies.The library is spacious and huge and had a vast collection of books which is great.The Hostel facilities are great student staff interactions are too good and has a great bond.The quality of the food is superb and tasty.The institution showed great support for sports and games and even helped the students to parti...

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure, Eco-Friendly Campus
reviews.review_text: The hostel mess food is not suitable for everyone. There is a gym in the hostel for both boys and girls. Free Wi-Fi is available for students. The health center operates 24/7. Various sports activities are offered, including inter-college competitions.

reviews.review_heading: Right one for career, good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi facility is available on our campus. Classrooms are quite okay. The library is notable as it has a vast collection of books on various categories. They conduct various clubs like arts, literature, sports, eco-green club, social service club, yoga, and more. Hostel mess food might not be okay for everyone, but many canteens are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: So dissatisfied with placement in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was good, and the food is also good. I'm not a hosteler. But there is no Wi-Fi connection. And not a good tower for any SIM; some time it's been total tower down also happen. There are many sports that are unimportant to sports and are not available.

reviews.review_heading: There is a lot of discrimination.
reviews.review_text: Teachers are very good and friendly to all. They are very skilled, and teaching subjects professionally will be very useful to our career. The hostel's quality and facilities are very good. The food and mess canteen are all very clean and good.

reviews.review_heading: There is a lot of discrimination.
reviews.review_text: The hostel stay is so comfortable that there are no words to describe it. Moreover, the food is also very clean and hygienic. There's currently no power cutting, and 24-hour Wi-Fi is provided with high-speed internet. Additionally, there is extensive security for girls, making them feel safer.

reviews.review_heading: I am very grateful to be in.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course, including Wi-Fi lab classrooms, are very comfy and pleasant, and it includes a nice library area, which gives the students a bright future. The university enables every little facility to improve our skills.

reviews.review_heading: A short review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good, with well-equipped labs and well-educated teachers in high-teaching classrooms with Wi-Fi access throughout the campus. I am a day student, although I know the facilities of the hostel. The hostel was super cool, with many amenities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a good campus. But the canteen is the only drawback.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has good infrastructure. We have lots of trees on the campus, and the classrooms are okay. The canteen on the campus is not good; that's the only drawback on the campus. On campus, I can breathe fresh air, and the environment itself gives me peace of mind.

reviews.review_heading: This college has a good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has average infrastructure. We have state-of-the-art infrastructure. But there is no good canteen on the campus. Good labs are all in good working condition, but not all are clean. Good green land under the mountains. Most of the fans and lights are not working.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Noorul Islam Centre for Higher Education.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is up to standard, and all the needed facilities are provided for the students. The labs have all the necessary facilities and also have a new iOS lab, which was inaugurated 3 months back. Medical facilities are provided to all the students for free.

college_info.intro:
NMAM Institute of Technology provides various courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, MCA, Diploma, etc. The admissions to these courses is through the NUCAT exam. The eligibility criteria for various courses is mentioned below:
BTech: candidates should have passed Class 12 or equivalent examination with not less than 50% (40% for candidates belonging to reserved category) marks as an aggregate in the optional subjects of Physics, Mathematics, and Chemistry / Biotechnology / Biology / Computer Science / Electronics, with English as one of the languages of study. The candidate should have completed 17 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission.
MTech: Candidates should have passed a bachelor’s degree or equivalent in the relevant field, with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% in the case of candidates belonging to the reserved category) in the qualifying examination.
MCA: Candidates should have passed a bachelor’s degree in Mathematics at Class 12 or Degree level. Candidates should have obtained a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the qualifying examination.

reviews_list.review_title: Things you should know before joining NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE University .

review_content.Placements: Around 60 percent of the students are placed, and the average salary is around 3 to 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are IT companies, but recently companies from UAE and Dubai came to our college to recruit biotech students. It is a cold drink company, and they wanted people for it.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is great. Like the hostel rooms, washrooms, classrooms, everything is great. We have AC classrooms, and there is one big library, one library where they keep journals, one for computer, one discussion room, and we also have department library. The only bad thing is we don't get proper Wi-Fi in college or hostel. Even the food in mess is bad, but the games and sports facilities are great. There are gyms, basketball court, and football court.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Bangalore days in NMMA College.

review_content.Placements: Our campus placements are new every year, and recruiters are new every year. The average package of our college is 9 LPA from robotics. The AI department has an average 22 LPA package. If I want placement in college itself, our major recruiters are from Japan, as our seniors were placed in Japan mostly, so we are also planning the same. Our college offers internships, especially summer internships for a year, and I'm currently completing an internship that has already been a year long. We can opt for another.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very different, as it is built in forest areas near coastal areas, and it is full of greenery. Hostel facilities are very good compared to other hostels. We get delicious food and menu changes every month. We get to eat different dishes in a week, there are 3 days of non-vegetarian food like chicken, and another 3 days of fish.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good research-oriented environment.

content.Placements: Nearly 30 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package of our course is 7 LPA. The average package is probably around 4.5 LPA. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for the course are Biocon and Merck. Almost 60 percent of the students got an internship at either industrial companies or at research centers in India.
content.Infrastructure: The Department of Biotechnology has around 5-6 labs for various subjects. Research is highly promoted to students at all academic years. Wi-Fi for both students and faculty is provided. The Department of Biotechnology also has a departmental library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good college.

content.Placements: 50 percent students are placed. 20 LPA is the highest, 2 LPA is the lowest, and 10 LPA is the average package offered for my course. Bicon, Fixar, Sipla, and some more really good companies come for placement in my course. All the students got internships because of their potential.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are really good, high standard, and well maintained. They clean it all, good and maintain it well. All these facilities are also really well maintained and very good for the students. It’s nice to enjoy all the things in and around the campus.

content.Placements: In my IT batch, about 82% were placed. The average is 5.2 LPA, the lowest is 3.2 LPA, and the highest is 11.5 LPA. Recruiters: Teach Mahindra, Wipro, and Accenture. 68% obtained internships at startups, Infosys, and HCL. Among the positions were QA tester, web developer, data analyst, and software engineer.

paragraphs: NMAM Institute of Technology admission 2026is open.NMAM Institute of Technologyadmission is primarily entrance-based. The institute accepts NUCAT entrance exams for admission to all of its courses, namely BTech, MTech, MCA and MBA. NMAM Institute of Technology offers multiple specialisations. Candidates can apply for admission online mode.

Candidates interested in getting into NMAM Institute of Technology are required to follow the NUCAT exam and NMAM Institute of Technology application process. Check out the below table for details onNMAM Institute of Technology course admissionwhich is inclusive of its eligibility & selection:

NMAM Institute of Technology course admissions 2026 for all of its courses is done based on entrance exams. Check below the complete NMAM Institute of Technology admission process:Application Process:
The mode of application for theNUCAT entrance examis online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.
Selection rounds:
Appear for the NUCAT entrance exam and appear for the college-based selection rounds and then wait for the release of their results
Admission confirmation:
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seats.

hostel_campus.college_name: NMAM Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel of the college is well equipped with every basic facility available at four different locations inside the campus. Separate hostel blocks are available for the boys and girls, UG and PG students. Every hostel block complex runs separate vegetarian and non-vegetarian mess. Exclusive cultural events, self development programs, academic support activities for the hosteliers are conducted in regular basis. All the hostel blocks are covered by campus Wi-Fi network.

library.description: The Library of the college has over 60000 volumes and subscribes to over 250 general and technical journals (both foreign and Indian). It is equipped with digital library facilities with a subscription to large number of e-journals through INDEST and DELNET.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Hockey Ground, Standard Athletic Turf Track

reviews.review_heading: Really good research-oriented environment.
reviews.review_text: The Department of Biotechnology has around 5-6 labs for various subjects. Research is highly promoted to students at all academic years. Wi-Fi for both students and faculty is provided. The Department of Biotechnology also has a departmental library.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are really good, high standard, and well maintained. They clean it all, good and maintain it well. All these facilities are also really well maintained and very good for the students. It’s nice to enjoy all the things in and around the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Things you should know before joining NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE University .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. Like the hostel rooms, washrooms, classrooms, everything is great. We have AC classrooms, and there is one big library, one library where they keep journals, one for computer, one discussion room, and we also have department library. The only bad thing is we don't get proper Wi-Fi in college or hostel. Even the food in mess is bad, but the games and sports facilities are great. There are gyms, basketball court, and football court.

reviews.review_heading: Bangalore days in NMMA College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very different, as it is built in forest areas near coastal areas, and it is full of greenery. Hostel facilities are very good compared to other hostels. We get delicious food and menu changes every month. We get to eat different dishes in a week, there are 3 days of non-vegetarian food like chicken, and another 3 days of fish.

reviews.review_heading: M.Teach Course admission information about location, facilities, placement, etc.
reviews.review_text: The library was well-stocked, classrooms had projectors, and the labs and Wi-Fi were good. The mess food was occasionally good, but the hostel was clean. There was space for badminton and cricket, a decent canteen, basic medical assistance, and limited sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty and placements in the 2024-2025 batch.
reviews.review_text: The building is old with average facilities; we do have AC and Wi-Fi, as well as filtered water. However, the hostel food is very poor, and the token system does not allow us to eat according to our wishes. The curfew time is very early; it feels like we are treating ourselves like 4-year-old kids.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are really good. The amazing at hosting events and gives great opportunities to students.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very clean and neat. Libraries are very organized. There is no Wi-Fi in classrooms. There are 2 types of Indian food, North and South. The food at the hostels is amazing. There is also a small medical clinic for the native students inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure some faculties are not good and and some good no extra holidays and only 3 days
reviews.review_text: Nice infrastructure during non rainy days. During rainy days there was a bad sell of birds poop in the college there are lot of birds on those during the offering season the campus was good they clean all the *** etc. And clean the campus fully and their also was the temple.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is located far from cities like Manglore and Udupi which is a drawback. The campus has been maintained well. Labs are well-equipped and air-conditioned. Hostel mess provides 3 meals a day and there are both options for South and North meals.

reviews.review_heading: A review on NMAMIT NITTE: Fees, infrastructure, and campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure and buildings with good computers and laboratories. Classrooms and well-ventilated, making it convenient for study. Washrooms are clean and hygienic. The college provides a hostel facility with fantastic food.

reviews.review_heading: Life at NMAMIT - Graduation batch of 2024.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure including fully equipped laboratories and a huge library. The is a strong Wi-Fi installed in the library and the hostel. Classrooms are decent and have projectors and centralized air-conditioning. The food in the canteen is hygienic and tasty. There is a sports complex on the campus with a gym, a cricket pitch, and a basketball court among many other sports facilities. College is well-equipped with labs and is a great learning space. Library is well-equipped...

reviews.review_heading: If you want to complete your B.Tech peacefully with decent placement join this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is best, compared to other colleges in this area. Labs are very good with good Wi-Fi connection (with high-end CPUs which can perform complex programs also i7). Classrooms are very good with AC and projector and good quality benches. Library is decent.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements. It provides a good quality of education.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi on the college premises. We have well-equipped labs with computers and centralised air-conditioned. We have a library and also an E-library, so we can access the library from anywhere. The quality of food in the hostel is good. We get breakfast, evening snacks, and dinner. There is an ambulance for immediate medical services.

reviews.review_heading: NMAMIT : Dream Reflector .
reviews.review_text: The department has many labs as required for its courses. Wi-Fi is available at every computer-based lab and there is a separate departmental library. Classrooms are fitted with projectors in each class. The library is full of books and foreign journals, with a capacity of 300 students at a time.

reviews.review_heading: My Overall Mediocre Experience .
reviews.review_text: We have pretty good labs and classrooms, but they don't turn on the AC in class, which is a major drawback in Karkala. Wi-Fi is simply for the sake of it. It's not at all fast for others to use. Only Ethernet cables are fast. The library is very old and compact with very bad librarians. The hostel is average in terms of infrastructure and food. The food is mediocre. It's a coupon-based system.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about NMAM Institute of Technology, NITTE University

likes.text: Companies like Infosys, Spaninfotech, Robosoft, VM Ware, etc., visited the campus for placements.
The placement in our college is excellent as a lot of companies come each year and hire students based on their skills.

paragraphs: To appreciate academic excellence, the university reserves 20% of the total seats for each programme or branch for candidates who top the NUCAT exam. High-achievers who secure the top positions in NUCAT are eligible for a scholarship, which covers 20% - 40% of the prescribed fee. This scholarship is a way for the university to recognize and reward the hard work and dedication of students who have achieved the highest scores in NUCAT.

overview_faqs.question: Is E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College good?
overview_faqs.answer: E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College, Tamil Nadu, is one of the well-reputed institutions for quality engineering education. Several under graduate and postgraduate programs are available to students there as it is affiliated with Anna University. There has long been an eagerness to join this college as it has experienced faculty members, modern infrastructure, and emphasis on practical training in labs and workshops. E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College boasts a great placement record because a large number of students get absorbed into the most competitive companies related to almost every sector. The college also encourages students to participate in extracurricular activities and research to mold them for better engineers.

overview_faqs.question: Is E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College has a rating of 3.6 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.62 on Campus Life, 3.32 on Placements, 3.88 on Faculty and 3.49 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College is around INR 35000 - INR 200000.

review_summary.college_name: E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Okay, good, but some staff are in favor of someone.

content.Placements: Only 50% of students get placed in my batch. They have offered jobs to every person, but the jobs are not related to the course. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. This is very low for my course. They do not concentrate on internships for my batch.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is okay, but I do not recommend the hostel. There is no Wi-Fi available for students. Mobile phones are not allowed on campus. The sports facilities are good. The canteen food is good, but the canteen space is very small for the entire engineering campus. It is not good at all.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: E. G. S. Pillay Engineering College is one of the best engineering colleges.

content.Placements: E. G. S. Pillay Engineering College's placement is good. This college has a strong placement training cell. They brought more than 15 companies for campus interviews. Reliance Construction, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc. These companies visit this college for recruitment. 90% of students are placed in reputed companies. The highest salary package is 8 LPA. The lowest salary package is 2.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: E. G. S. Pillay Engineering College has more laboratories and classroom facilities. This college has well-equipped library facilities. This college provides hostel facilities for boys and girls. The hostel food tastes good. Multiple sports ground facilities are also available here at this college. This college provides Wi-Fi network facilities across the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College For B.E. / B.Teach CSE admission in 2025.

content.Placements: This college provides the best salary package for every student. The salary package offered by the companies ranges from 4-8 LPA. This course is very good to get the salary package. Students should score above 70% in academics to participate in this course placement. Companies like TCS, Wipro, etc., provide internships in the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides very high-quality products and multiple facilities like classrooms, labs, library, fast Wi-Fi, bathroom, canteen, etc. The hostel facility is available. Canteen facilities are available, and it provides the best quality of food.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: EGS Pillay Engineering College Review

content.Placements: Around 80% of students get placement offers. Placements are based on the branch; circuit branches offer awesome placement opportunities, while core branches have decent placements. The highest package was 53 LPA. Top recruiters are Oracle Academy, IBM, AutoCAD, TCS, Bosch, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi facilities 24/7 in the hostel and college campus area. The library is also available on the campus. Separate hostels for boys and girls with all basic and essential facilities. Sports and games are also available on the campus. First aid is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Better facilities are provided by our college.

content.Placements: Placements are good; more than 65 percent of students were placed in our college, with the highest salary package of 9.8 lakhs per annum and the lowest salary package of 3 lakhs per annum. Many MNCs and IBM companies visit. A few students got internships through our college.
content.Infrastructure: Excellent infrastructure and facilities are available, including Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and provided books. Separate classrooms are provided for each branch. Hostel food is acceptable, medical facilities are available, and sports and games are conducted.

admission_process.title: E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College considers scores in GATE, CEETA, and TANCET for admission to specific courses.E.G.S. Pillay Engineering Collegeoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,65,000 - 2,00,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 35,000 - 50,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Yes, students get direct admission to E.G.S Pillay Engineering College. The college offers direct addmission only for those students who have passed the 12th class. Those students who have passed the 10th class exam are considered eligible for addmission but not eligible for direct addmission.

reviews.review_heading: EGS Pillay Engineering College is absolutely the best college
reviews.review_text: EGS Pillay Engineering College has very good infrastructure facilities, such as mechanical labs, electrical labs, and multiple computer laboratories with internet facilities. The hostel facilities are very good, and the rooms are maintained in excellent condition daily. There is also a well-equipped library. The canteen food is very tasty. reviews.review_heading: E. G. S. Pillay Engineering College is really good Engineering College .
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and facilities are very nice. Many department libraries are available in the college. Full campus has free Wi-Fi network and CCTV camera facilities are available. Nobody can move without permission in the college campus. The college library facility is very good. Boys and girls hostel are also available the college. Both veg and non veg foods also available in the college hostel. Basketball and badminton, sports grounds facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is decent and libraries and Wi-Fi are available. 
The hostel is available in good condition and the food is also good. Sports are conducted once a year, department-wise and canteen facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: EGS Pillay Engineering College (autonomous).
reviews.review_text: EGS campus is well designed; we have each nearby campus. There are many functions are conducted in this college, like aksharam cultural festival, alumni meet, pongal celebration, etc. I am a cricket player, and my college supports sports people. The library has a lot of academic books and journal collections; no Wi-Fi is only for office work, not for students. My hostel accommodation rent is monthly room that is comfortable and bathroom privately used in one room. Food is good once a week, non-v...

reviews.review_heading: Review of E.G.S. Pillay Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The campus provides separate hostels for boys and girls. The hostels are provided with all basic facilities like mineral water, bathrooms, water coolers, washing machines, and common reading rooms. The infrastructure and facilities available on campus are amongst the very best. Labs, classrooms, and the library were good.

reviews.review_heading: 60% above is required in the Bachelor of Computer Science.
reviews.review_text: Separate hostels for boys and girls are available at very affordable prices. Hostel admission is done on a first come, first served basis. They insist on having your parents with you at the time of admission, but it's a pretty flexible process, and still, life was pretty fun. The hostel facilities are very good. You will have access to hot and cold water around the clock. You have two options for hostel rooms: AC and non-AC rooms. The quality of the mess is good. You have 1 cafe known as Rising ...

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Satisfied because of good infrastructure of the college. Extremely beautiful and good infrastructure. Classrooms, labs, library, sports ground and Wi-Fi are available. The campus provides separate hostels for boys and girls with attached bathrooms. Mineral water is provided in all the rooms. Canteen's food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is very good in terms of sports.
reviews.review_text: The campus has free Wi-Fi but Mobile phones are not allowed on campus. The laboratories are well-equipped with instruments. This college provides library cards, and we can take three books for self studies. Sports are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Very excellent in sports.
reviews.review_text: The labs are enough and well-equipped. The college has free Wi-Fi but no mobile phone usage inside the campus as well as college bus. We take college books from library using library card. The sports are well good in the college. The canteen is average and restriction for sitting boys and girls together.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the facilities at our college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our department are not good compared to other departments like CSE, IT, ECE, etc. There is no Wi-Fi facility for students, but the library is good. Hostel facilities are not that good in terms of food, snacks, etc., compared to other hostels.

review_summary.college_name: ITM University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Students can join ITM because it has highly educated teachers and a healthy environment.

content.Placements: ITM University Raipur achieved an approximate placement rate of 77%, with a minimum package of 2.5 LPA and a maximum of 12.5 LPA, and top recruiting companies include Infosys, Wipro, TCS, and HCL in the IT and software sector, and HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Kotak Bank, Mahindra Bank, and Axis Bank in the banking and finance sector, while Bachelor of Business Administration students secured 90% internships and Masters of Business Administration students secured 100% internships, with top roles in IT and software being web developer and software developer, and in marketing, marketing manager focused on developing an existing market.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Retail Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a nice college, and students can take a look at it.

content.Placements: I am in the first semester, so I do not know about placements, but it offers many placements. Some students went out of India for internships and have been placed in good companies in India. Most of the students went to Mumbai and Delhi.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi service. The hostel food is not at all good, and it is too far from the city. No vehicles are available. It is 20 kilometers away from the city. Rooms are also not clean. I have heard from my friends, so I do not suggest students to take admission in the college hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good and provides good placements in our state.

content.Placements: Placements at our college are good, so it ranked no. 1 in Raipur. The highest salary package offered in our course is 25 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 9 LPA. Top recruiting companies are IDBI, Airtel, etc. Top roles offered in our course are data analytic, manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are nice but not up to the mark. There are various facilities available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. I just want to add one thing according to the fee structure, they should add air conditioners in all classrooms. If I talk about hostels, the hostel facility is very bad. There is nothing except a mess. Medical facilities are also poor.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Mobile Application and Information Security - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The complete information about the ITM University Raipur.

content.Placements: I scored 67% in my board exam. The highest salary package offered in university is 13 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies in our program are Infosys, AWS, and Microsoft. Top roles offered in university are data science and data analyst in IT sector.
content.Infrastructure: There are 2 pods on university campus, where pod 1 is separate for science and engineering courses and has all facilities like computer lab, chemistry lab, and library. Whereas pod 2 has BBA, LL.B, B.Com, hospital, and hotel management.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Because of the good infrastructure, people can take admission.

content.Placements: It does not provide placement in the Bachelor's degree. Every year, 1 or 2 get placed. The percentage needed is 99%. The highest package is up to 12 LPA. They provide internships for B.Com in the last year. The companies they offer are Hyatt, and Reliance, and the lowest package is 9 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Great infrastructure and hostel facilities are good. There are different departments for doing each activity, labs, library, and Wi-Fi are also provided in the library. Mess and canteen are provided for hosteler students. Food is good and provided by the college.

admission_process.title: ITM University Raipur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: ITM University Raipur admissionsare primarily merit-based. The institute offers direct admission to UG and PG courses.ITM University Raipuroffers courses in multiple streams such as Business & Management studies, Engineering, Law, Science, Commerce & Accounting, IT & Software, and Hospitality & Travel. Candidates can apply on the official website of the university for their preferred course. The institute accepts valid scores obtained by the candidates in other national-level exams such as CAT, CUET, CMAT, and more for some of its offered courses.
ITM University 2025 Admissions Open:Apply Now

ITM University Raipur offers over fifteen courses across several specialisations at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. Students are accepted on both merit and entrance basis depending on the programme. The courses are offered in full-time mode. Below are the keyITM University Raipur admissionhighlights 2025:
Particulars
ITM University Raipur Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
https://www.itmuniversity.org/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

ITM University Raipur offers direct admission to candidates fulfilling the course-specific eligibility criteria for a select few programmes. The university accepts valid score obtained by the candidates in the relevant entrance exams as well. Below areITM University Raipur coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Graduate in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate
Minimum 50% score in MBA Entrance Exam

ITM University Raipur's fee structure comprises of several components. Students are required to pay the fee at the time of admission in order to confirm their seat at the university.ITM University Raipur's feeranges between INR 65,000 and INR 6.1 lakh, depending on the course and specialisation selected. Students can refer to the table below to learn more about the fees of some of the popular courses offered atITM University Raipur:

ITM University Raipur admission processincludes multiple steps such as registration, selection, and admission confirmation. Aspirants can apply for their preferred course both in online or offline mode. Below are the steps to get a seat in ITM University Raipur:
STEP 1: ITM University Raipur Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can fill out the application form on the university website or collect the same from the admission office of the campus. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 to register for a programme.
STEP 2: Selection

Applicants are selected for UG and PG courses based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The university offers direct admission to the candidates. For MBA, aspirants can also apply with an entrance exam score. The university evaluates the application form of the candidates to confirm their eligibility.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment
The university informs the candidates about their selection via email or message. Selected candidates are further required to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

courses_data.name: ITM University Raipur BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: ITM University Raipur offers four-year BTech in Computer Science degree spread across eight semesters. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics,Chemistryand Mathematics can apply for BTech programme. The selection for BTech is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in ITM University Raipur for BTech with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics to apply for ITM University BTech programme. The university has not specified the minimum aggregate. However,  60% in Class 12 is a decent score. Candidates with a 60% in Class 12 can get admission in BTech course of ITM University Raipur.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in BTech at ITM University Raipur?
faqs.answer: ITM University Raipur offers direct admission to BTech course. Candidates need to apply for BTech on the official website of the university. The eligibility of the candidates are evaluates for selection. Aspirants need to complete a minimum of Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics to apply for BTech programme. Once selected, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at ITM University Raipur?
faqs.answer: The total fee for ITM University Raipur BTech isINR 3.40 lakh. The tuition fee is paid semester-wise for BTech programme. Candidates need to pay a course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Besides, aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,000 in the start to register for a course.

courses_data.name: ITM University Raipur BBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: ITM University Raipur offers three-year BBA programme at the UG level. The selection for BBA is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates need to complete Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate to apply for BBA programme. In case the seats remain vacant then the minimum required percentage may be lowered by 5% with permission from the Vice Chancellor.

faqs.question: Does ITM University Raipur offer BBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, ITM University Raipur offers three-year BBA programme at the UG level. The course is spread across six semesters. The selection for BBA is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates need to complete Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate to apply for BBA programme.

hostel_campus.college_name: ITM University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
The hostel provides: Separate Blocks for Boys & Girls, Caretakers: Male & Female Wardens with 24X7 room attendants available, Two & Three sharing spacious rooms with separate beds, Every room has Air Coolers & Geyser, Hostels notified as RESTRICTED areas, Entry & Exit from the hostels are controlled by security officers at The Entrance Gate, Female Security Officers controls the Girls Hostel Entry Gate, 
The whole Hostel Building & Surroundings are closely monitored by CCTV, A Water purifier (industrial UV system) is available, and Housekeeping Services, a Lift Facility, Recreation rooms for entertainment, FA Facility, Emergency Medical Aid (Tie Up with a Doctor & Hospital is existing), Fire Safety System, Medical Emergency:- 24 hrs Vehicle available for medical emergency and Free Transport from Hostel to City for outing on Sundays

reviews.review_heading: Students can join ITM because it has highly educated teachers and a healthy environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a nice college, and students can take a look at it.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi service. The hostel food is not at all good, and it is too far from the city. No vehicles are available. It is 20 kilometers away from the city. Rooms are also not clean. I have heard from my friends, so I do not suggest students to take admission in the college hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good and provides good placements in our state.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are nice but not up to the mark. There are various facilities available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. I just want to add one thing according to the fee structure, they should add air conditioners in all classrooms. If I talk about hostels, the hostel facility is very bad. There is nothing except a mess. Medical facilities are also poor.

reviews.review_heading: The complete information about the ITM University Raipur.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 pods on university campus, where pod 1 is separate for science and engineering courses and has all facilities like computer lab, chemistry lab, and library. Whereas pod 2 has BBA, LL.B, B.Com, hospital, and hotel management.

reviews.review_heading: Because of the good infrastructure, people can take admission.
reviews.review_text: Great infrastructure and hostel facilities are good. There are different departments for doing each activity, labs, library, and Wi-Fi are also provided in the library. Mess and canteen are provided for hosteler students. Food is good and provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: It's all about events and fests that make ITM so enjoyable.
reviews.review_text:
Classes: We don't have AC in our classes and no Wi-Fi also. We were promised that we would be provided with Wi-Fi, but only the MBA classes have AC.
Moving on to the labs, they are good, with high-tech software and a big projector as well.
Libraries: We have two libraries on campus, and they have every book I can ever need for my courses. On top of that, the library also has some fun adventure books.

reviews.review_heading: Very helpful and supportive teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides decent-quality facilities. The infrastructure of the college was well maintained and developed. Our course department has facilities like a lab, library, canteen, hostel, mess, etc. The hostel of the college has furnished rooms and the food in the mess was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: College had a decent faculty and very supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college was good. The college campus was spread over a large area and lush with greenery. College management provided all the amenities like library, labs, Wi-Fi, canteen, hostel, playgrounds, etc. The college campus and hostel of the college were fully secured. No one can enter the campus without permission.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college for students.
reviews.review_text: My college has a decent library with e resources available, but unfortunately, the Wi-Fi connectivity is unreliable. Additionally there is no AC in college premises, making it uncomfortable during summers. As for the canteen and mess they are average in terms of quality.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ITM University, Raipur.
reviews.review_text: Digital boards are available in our classrooms. Air-conditioners are also available. All the classrooms are well-ventilated. The food served in the mess is very good. Playground is also available. Hostel rooms are clean and washrooms are better.

reviews.review_heading: Review of ITM University, Raipur.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available. There are classrooms with facilities like projectors, sound boxes, mics, blackboards, and coolers. There are two huge libraries with many books from different genres, authors, fields, and courses. I am not a hosteler. There are many places like mini-markets, parks, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Too bad to be a college. It is not a good college.
reviews.review_text: Before covid, the campus was okay but Post covid, there's zero maintenance and the garden area looks like a 100 year old haunted place. The University has no cafeteria at all. There's a small Tapri operated by a sweet native family. They're nice people and serve average food. There's a tuck shop too.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied as they provide the best they can with good placements, infrastructure, and events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university was good with proper facilities for drinking water and clean toilets. The library has a good collection of books which our faculty members asked us to consider. Our labs and classrooms are well maintained. There were no sports. The university was clean with a modern infrastructure. The canteen was also good. A hostel was provided in the city and bus facilities were also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for those who want to study, and not good for those who want to enjoy college life.
reviews.review_text: The college and hostel are neat and clean, the daily housekeeper comes and cleans the hostel, they clean like they are cleaning their home, every corner, etc. Mess food Is average. Weekly 2 times nonveg like chicken egg etc. Hostel time for boys is 6:00 Am to 9:30 PM.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is worth the money and the education.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good. There are different floors for different departments. Library is good. Labs are fully air-conditioned. Classrooms have water coolers. Hostel facility and food are provided. Three times meals and one-time snacks are provided. Hostel fee is Rs.10,000 per semester.

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfaction with the college in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: As we start with the placement, the placement record of the university is excellent. Around 90% of students got placed at MNCs and other associations. The highest package is overall 85 LPA, and for pharmacy 8 LPA. It has associations with many companies like Dabur, Cipla, Apple, Akems, Biotech, etc. In industries, students are selected for production department, formulation department, QA department, QC department, etc. Overall, in every field, placement opportunities are vast.
review_content.Infrastructure: A well-ventilated classroom with Wi-Fi and smart board is available for each class except AC. Library is vast with 2 different libraries, one for technical field and other for medical field. Labs are well-equipped here. Hostel is huge with playground and greenery. It provides good quality food.

reviews_list.review_title: Great faculty support, decent placements, and a helpful campus environment.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% got placed, with the highest package at 12 LPA, the lowest at 3 LPA, and an average of 5 LPA. Top companies included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Cognizant. 60% secured internships in startups and government organizations. Roles offered were primarily software developer, system analyst, and frontend/backend developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are AC with fast internet and updated PCs. Classrooms are digital, and Wi-Fi and the library are good. Sports facilities like taekwondo, volleyball, and a gym are available.
