review_summary.college_name: Haridwar University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: You can take admission in my college if you have a low budget and just want a degree.

content.Placements: A maximum of 80 percent of students got placed from my course. The highest package is 1-5 crore per annum, the average is 10 LPA-15 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA-5 LPA. Google and Amazon are the recruiting companies for my course. 79 percent get an internship for my course in PW, Google, and Amazon. The top roles are like data analytics and web development.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are Wi-Fi, AC in labs, computer, library, and camera are good. The food quality is nice, but the canteen is a little expensive. The food in the mess is nice. You can try the canteen food. The food at the mess is very simple, but it is amazing.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Ready for campus life or college life.

content.Placements: Approximately 65% students were placed in my course. I have seen my seniors. The highest is 85LPA, the lowest is 4.5LPA, and the average is 8.8LPA. The top recruiting companies are (TCS, Infosys, Imperial Shopping ) About internship, I do not know now data analyst, software developed, data engineers.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my college are very good, and the lab facility is a very good classroom. I love. It library is amazing. All the books are available there The hostel and mess are very good, and the food is good. Medical facilities are not that good, but we can manage them. For sports, there is a fest called utkars, and the sports teacher is good .

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfaction with the college in all aspects.

content.Placements: As we start with the placement, the placement record of the university is excellent. Around 90% of students got placed at MNCs and other associations. The highest package is overall 85 LPA, and for pharmacy 8 LPA. It has associations with many companies like Dabur, Cipla, Apple, Akems, Biotech, etc. In industries, students are selected for production department, formulation department, QA department, QC department, etc. Overall, in every field, placement opportunities are vast.
content.Infrastructure: A well-ventilated classroom with Wi-Fi and smart board is available for each class except AC. Library is vast with 2 different libraries, one for technical field and other for medical field. Labs are well-equipped here. Hostel is huge with playground and greenery. It provides good quality food.

individual_reviews.course: MCA with AI - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great faculty support, decent placements, and a helpful campus environment.

content.Placements: Around 70% got placed, with the highest package at 12 LPA, the lowest at 3 LPA, and an average of 5 LPA. Top companies included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Cognizant. 60% secured internships in startups and government organizations. Roles offered were primarily software developer, system analyst, and frontend/backend developer.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are AC with fast internet and updated PCs. Classrooms are digital, and Wi-Fi and the library are good. The hostel is clean, and mess food is average, though manageable. Medical facilities are available and fine; an ambulance is not. Sports facilities like taekwondo, volleyball, and a gym are available.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A balanced life in college.

content.Placements: I don't know the exact percentage of students getting placed. The highest package on campus from my course is 8 LPA-9 LPA, and the lowest package offer is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Byju's, etc. The University provides internships to students in college for an unfair charge.
content.Infrastructure: All over, the infrastructure is good, the classrooms and library are good and cleaned, but when we use Wi-Fi, there are so many restrictions on many websites and apps. We can only use some specific websites and app. The labs are okay. There are low-end systems that do not work properly.

admission_overview.college_name: Haridwar University Admission 2026: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: Haridwar University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Haridwar University admissions are entrance-based. The university conducts the HUAET or Haridwar University Admission Entrance Test and an entrance test for UG/ PG and PhD courses, respectively. The university also considers scores in national-level entrance exams such as JEE, UGC-NET, CSIR-NET, etc. for admission to specific courses. Haridwar University offers more than 50 courses at UG, PG, diploma, certificate and PhD levels in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Commerce, Science, etc. through five colleges. Interested candidates can apply online or offline for admission.

eligibility_selection.title: Haridwar University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: The university selects candidates based on their scores in national or university-level entrance exams. Haridwar University conducts HUAET for admission to UG and PG programmes. The university also conducts a separate entrance exam for PhD programme. Check below the top Haridwar University courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) from a recognised board

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for admission to Haridwar University?

faqs.answer: Candidates must pass BCA or equivalent bachelor's degree in Computer Science/ IT from a recognised university. Aspirants who have passed bachelor's degree with Mathematics/ Statistics as one subject or 4 year BTech in Computer Science/ IT can apply for MCA at Haridwar University.The minimum aggregate required is 50% and 45% for reserved category (SC/ ST) candidates in bachelor's degree and minimum 40% in Computer Science subjects.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for MCA at Haridwar University?

faqs.answer: To be eligible for the D Pharma degree programme at Haridwar University, Roorkee, one must have completed their 10+2 education with a minimum of 50% aggregate marks in the Science stream. If you have more than 70% in your 12th grade you will easily get into haridwar university for the D.Pharma Program. The cutt-off varies in between 50% to 65%. So if your are having more then 65% then your are on safer side.
faqs.question: What is the latest cutoff information on D.Pharma admissions at Haridwar University?

faqs.answer: The total tuition fees of B.Tech at Haridwar University range between Rs 3.3 Lacs – 4.57 lakhs. The Tuition fee for B.Tech Hons CSE is Rs. 4.57 Lacs while that of B.Tech Mechanical Engineering is Rs. 3.3 Lakhs.

admission_process.title: Haridwar University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Haridwar University admissionsare open for all the courses. Admission to the courses is based on university or national-level entrance exam. Check below steps to get a seat in the university:
Haridwar University Application Process 2026

The mode of application for Haridwar University is online and offline. Candidates need to pay a fee to apply for a course. The application fee for a course isINR 1,000. Aspirants can also visit the campus in-person for the application form.

The university shortlists candidates for most of the programmes based on their scores in HUAET. For BTech (Hons) admission, the university also acceptsJEE Mainscores. The university also considers CUET scores for admission to UG courses. The selection for PhD programme is based on scores in the university entrance test such asUCG-NET,CSIR-NET,GATEorCEED. Candidates selected for PhD also need to pass a personal interview round.
Admission Confirmation

The university releases the results for the entrance test on the college's website. Haridwar University prepares a merit list based on the entrance exam scores of the candidates. Selected candidates need to submit the documents. Aspirants need to pay theHaridwar University feesto confirm their seats. Check below the list of documents for admission:
lists: High School- Marksheets, Certificate & Character Certificate
Affidavit for Gap Period ( if any)

courses_data.name: Haridwar University BTech Admission 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:JEE Main, CBSE 12th, ISC, UK 12th
courses_data.description: Haridwar University offers a four-year full-time BTech (Hons) programme divided into eight semesters. Candidates can apply for the BTech (Hons) programme after completing Class 12. BTech (Hons) is available in various specialisations, such asComputer Science Engineering,Mechanical, CSE in AI & ML, Cyber Security, Data Science, etc. Besides, the university also offers lateral entry to the BTech course. Candidates are offered a seat in the BTech programme based on their score in JEE Main, CUET or HUAET.

faqs.question: Does Haridwar University offer lateral entry in BTech programme?
faqs.answer: Yes, Haridwar University offers lateral entry to the BTech (Hons) course. The university offers BTech (LE) in specialisations such as Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics & Communication, CSE in AI & ML. Candidates who have completed Diploma examination or BSc degree from a recognised university can apply for BTech (LE).

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BTech (Hons) at Haridwar University?
faqs.answer: Haridwar University admission to BTech (Hons) course is based on scores in JEE Main or CUET. Aspirants can also appear for Haridwar University Admission Entrance Test. The university reviews the eligibility and entrance exam scores of the aspirants for final selection. Once the candidates are selected, they need to come for document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted for admission to B.Tech at Haridwar University?
faqs.answer: The admission to B.Tech at Haridwar University can be taken through JEE main score.

Admission to the MBA course is based on the university entrance exam-HUAET score. Candidates who have completed a minimum of three years graduation with at least 50% aggregate from a recognised university can apply for MBA.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for Haridwar University?
faqs.answer: Candidates are first required to apply for the preferred programme in online or offline mode. Haridwar University shortlists candidates for most of the programmes based on HUAET scores. The university also accepts CUET scores for UG programmes. Besides, the university also accepts JEE Main and GATE scores for BTech and MTech programmes, respectively. Once selection rounds are completed, candidates are required to submit the specified documents and pay the course fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Are admissions open at Haridwar University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Haridwar University admissions are currently open for all the courses. Candidates can apply online or get the form from the campus. The university conducts Haridwar University Admission Entrance Test or HUAET to select candidates for admission. Besides, the university also accept scores in national-level entrance exams.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission at Haridwar University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Haridwar University considers entrance exam scores for admission to UG, PG and PhD courses. The university conducts HUAET for UG and PG programmes and an entrance test for PhD. Besides, Haridwar University also accepts scores in CUET, JEE Main, GATE, UGC-NET, CSIR-NET for admission to specific programmes. The requirement of the entrance exam is course-specific. Besides, aspirants may also need to pass a personal interview round for some of the courses for final selection.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BTech (Hons) course at Haridwar University?
faqs.answer: Haridwar University admission to BTech (Hons) is based onJEE Mainscore. Additionally, candidates who have passed Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate can apply for the BTech (Hons) course. As soon as the selection rounds are over, aspirants are required to submit the specified documents for verification and pay a fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Does Haridwar University have a placement cell?
faqs.answer: Yes, the University has a Training and Placement Cell that liaises with various different industrial establishments, corporate houses, etc., which conduct campus interviews for the students. The corporate cell at HU tries to bridge the gap between analytical and functional skills by providing the best opportunities to the students. The Placement Cell maintains regular interaction with the corporate houses through orientation programmes, guest lectures, industrial visits, corporate get-togethers, industry expert talks, industrial exposure, alumni interaction, etc.

The cell offers complete support, including resume writing, interview preparation, and soft skills development. The university's placement cell also invites various pharmaceutical companies and related industries to conduct placement drives. The activities follow by HU placements cell are: Soft skills Communication skills Alumni talks Live Industry projects Employability assessment Entrepreneurship cell

faqs.question: Does Haridwar University have good placements?
faqs.answer: As for the placement statistics HU has a rather decent record, although the number of companies coming for recruitment is constantly increasing. According to the university's website, some of the top recruiters include: - Adobe - Amazon - IBM - Infosys - Microsoft - TCS - Wipro According to the university’s job placement statistics of the last few years it has been experiencing a placement ratio of about 80-90%. Some courses have better ratings than others. However, it must be stated here that placement statistics also differ from year to year and may also be influenced by several parameters including programs, batch, and market conditions.

hostel_campus.college_name: Haridwar University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostel facility have Capacity of 1200 boys & 900 Girls, 1024 rooms.
facilities: A library with a collection of over 100,000 books and journals.
A number of laboratories for different subjects.
Separate hostels for boys and girls.
Sports facilities, such as a football ground, a cricket ground, a basketball court, and a volleyball court.
An auditorium that can accommodate over 1,000 people.

hostel.description: Hostel facility have Capacity of 1200 boys & 900 Girls, 1024 rooms.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in my college if you have a low budget and just want a degree.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are Wi-Fi, AC in labs, computer, library, and camera are good. The food quality is nice, but the canteen is a little expensive. The food in the mess is nice. You can try the canteen food. The food at the mess is very simple, but it is amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Ready for campus life or college life.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure available in my college are very good, and the lab facility is a very good classroom. I love. It library is amazing. All the books are available there 
The hostel and mess are very good, and the food is good. Medical facilities are not that good, but we can manage them. For sports, there is a fest called utkars, and the sports teacher is good .

reviews.review_heading: Satisfaction with the college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: A well-ventilated classroom with Wi-Fi and smart board is available for each class except AC. Library is vast with 2 different libraries, one for technical field and other for medical field. Labs are well-equipped here. Hostel is huge with playground and greenery. It provides good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty support, decent placements, and a helpful campus environment.
reviews.review_text: Labs are AC with fast internet and updated PCs. Classrooms are digital, and Wi-Fi and the library are good. The hostel is clean, and mess food is average, though manageable. Medical facilities are available and fine; an ambulance is not. Sports facilities like taekwondo, volleyball, and a gym are available.

reviews.review_heading: A balanced life in college.
reviews.review_text: All over, the infrastructure is good, the classrooms and library are good and cleaned, but when we use Wi-Fi, there are so many restrictions on many websites and apps. We can only use some specific websites and app. The labs are okay. There are low-end systems that do not work properly.

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty, strong placement support, and a lively campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-equipped labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern classrooms with SMART boards, and access to a vast library with digital resources. Hostel facilities were good. Clean rooms with decent ventilation and 24/7 security. Mess food is average but hygienic, and canteen has a variety of options. Medical facilities are available with a 24/7 ambulance service. Sports infrastructure is well-maintained, with courts for basketball, cricket, football, and indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great university with every facility.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Classrooms and buildings are very good. Everything is very neat and clean. Rooms are also good. Washrooms are also clean and hygienic. The hostel's food quality is very good, tasty, and healthy. Wi-Fi is very good. The library is very quiet and good.

reviews.review_heading: Haridwar University is the best.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, and the infrastructure is also good. Wi-Fi is always available. Food quality is good. Mess food and their services are good. The canteen is the best. The canteen staff members and their services are also good, with prices. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Properly satisfied with the university because of good faculty, better placement, and good exposure.
reviews.review_text: A well-ventilated classroom with Wi-Fi and smart board is available for each class except AC. The library is vast, with 2 different libraries, one for the technical field, the other for the medical field, and well-equipped labs. The hostel is huge, with playground, greenery, and good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and placements, active student life, but some scope for academic improvement.
reviews.review_text: The campus and hostel are covered by a 100 Mbps BSNL leased line with a full optical fiber backbone. A Smatguard firewall ensures secure, reliable connectivity for academic work. Ergonomically designed lecture hall features projectors, interactive whiteboards, and wired/wireless internet. There are separate boys' and girls' hostels, and rooms are fully furnished with beds, study tables, wardrobes, and CCTV. The food quality is not good in the mess. On-campus ambulance and first-aid kits are avai...

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with BCA courses.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is average. It will be good to visit. Medical facilities are not well maintained or available. Hostel warden is good and rules are strict. If any inconvenience happens, then warden is helpful to get out of that. College is ragging-free and in hostel too.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements, great infrastructure, and skilled faculty for the computer science branch.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, digital and smart classrooms, and access to online library portals. Hostels are decent with clean rooms, but no 24x7 water or electricity access. Regular cleaning is done there. The mess food is average but hygienic. There's also a sports ground and a gym facility.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, supportive faculty members, and good placements. Overall, a good choice.
reviews.review_text: Department has well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, and a good library. Hostel rooms are clean, decent mess food, medical support, and excellent sports facilities for overall development. Both the academic and hostel infrastructure are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The college has excellent placements and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Well-equipped labs, smart classrooms and a decent library. Wi-Fi access is available throughout the campus. 2. Classrooms are clean, spacious and the labs are modern and regularly updated for practical sessions. 3. Hostel rooms are clean and well-maintained. 4. Separate hostels for boys and girls with 24/7 security. Mess food is average but hygienic

reviews.review_heading: The college has an excellent infrastructure and supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: In this university, classrooms are spacious. Faculty members use digital monitors for teaching. The library and labs are well maintained, and most equipment is available. Our hostel is also well maintained. The quality of food is much better compared to other places.

college_info.college_name: Haridwar University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The Diploma in Pharmacy programme at Haridwar University is two- year undergraduate Diploma course. The total fee for DPharm at HU includes several components such as hostel fees, tuition fees, application fees, admission fees, etc.

Hostel fees: The hostel fees is INR 1.52 lakh, this fees amount is calculated on the basis of Ist year/semesters. Additionally, the hostel fee might vary according to the accommodation and mess charges. Those students who opt for non-veg meals have to pay an additional cost of INR 20,000 in mess charges per year.
Tuition fees: DPharm programme at HU is an undergraduate two- year Diploma programme. Fees for first year of the course is INR 80,000 and for second year is INR 70,000.
Application fees: After completion of application procedure, candidates have to submit the application fee i.e., INR 1000. This fee is a non-refundable.
Admission fee: After being selected from the merit list, candidates must pay an admission fee of INR 25,000 for the BPharm programme at Haridwar University.

Haridwar University BPharm course is a four-year undergraduate degree programme, divided into eight semester and, offered in full time mode. The total fee of the course includes several components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, mess charges, admission fee etc. To know more about the semester wise fees bifurcation of the course, refer to the table mentioned below:
Year
Fee
First Year
Second Year
Third Year
Fourth Year
The fee amount mentioned is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The total fees for the BPharm course at Haridwar University range from INR 3.3 Lacs to INR 4.6 lakh. The university offers various fee concessions in the form of scholarships. Scholarships are awarded based on students' PCM/PCB percentages in Class 12, as well as other criteria such as sports achievements and merit.

Haridwar University scholarships include: PCM/PCB percentage scholarships, sports quota scholarships, meritorious scholarships and other quota scholarships. Students can receive a fee concession ranging from 10% to 80% on total fee amount, depending on the scholarship type and eligibility.

A:    Vignan's Institute of Engineering for Women (VIEW Visakhapatnam) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.

content.Placements: The 2026 students of my college, my seniors, are not placed in good positions, only some people got the jobs. content.Infrastructure: The class are good, and the labs are also good. In our college, the phone signal is very poor. The college also does not provide any Wi-Fi connection to the students. My college infrastructure is very nice, and I loved my college a lot. It is a very good college, and we enjoyed it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A short note about my college.

content.Placements: I had done Electronics and Communication Engineering at Vignan's Institute of Engineering for Women. The highest package is 13 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Cognizant, Accenture, Infosys, etc. The percentage of getting an internship is low, but the percentage of providing an online internship is high.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is super cool and good with different environments. The hostel environment is also very good. Rooms are well organized with attached bathrooms and cupboards. Facilities include Wi-Fi, mineral water, hot water, and indoor games. Food served is hygienic in the mess with a weekly menu from students' input.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The beauty of Vignan Institute of Engineering for Women.

content.Placements: In my college, 50 percent of students got placements. They also offered internships, which we can do either in our college or outside the college. We got placements for companies like Synergies, TCS, Infosys, and so on. Every student who graduated from this college was either studying M.Tech or doing a job.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms were very neat and clean. We also have Wi-Fi facilities in the corridors. There was also a library where the students could learn from the textbooks in their free time. We also had a hostel. The medical facilities and the canteen were good.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Candidates willing to get admission to various courses must take part in the MATS University admission process before the last date of application. Candidates must know their MATS University eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. At the UG level, the university offers a three-year regular , three-year regular , and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the university offers two-year regular MCom, , MSc, and various other courses to students. The university also provides diploma and other courses to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by MATS University and their respective eligibility and MATS University fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    MATS University offers admission based on merit and valid entrance exam scores. Therefore, candidates must secure the minimum aggregate in Class 12 to seek admission at UG level courses. Whereas, for PG level courses, candidates must secure valid scores in graduation.Moreover, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, LSAT, CAT, XAT, MAT, GATE and others. Candidates are shortlisted for the counselling process and after all the selection rounds, final merit list is drawn. Final admission is offered once the shortlisted candidates pay the fees for seat confirmation.

review_summary.college_name: MATS University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I don't think this college is good for people.

content.Placements: The percentage of students getting placed is very low. They usually get placement in private companies, but the college's role in bringing those placements is very low. People usually do this course and get placed. In college, I have seen people from other batches getting jobs with the exception. The average package in my course is that students got jobs in private schools, with a salary of Rs. 15,000 to Rs. 20,000. I hardly know anything about the companies. Nobody got a company placement from the college, and nobody got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is for name sake, it is for attracting students who are not willing to study but are just coming to have a degree in their name. My friend was thrown out of the hostel. The next exam was over without notifying the students beforehand.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Bad infrastructure, micro management, and poor facilities.

content.Placements: The placements are non-existent and mostly are to NGOs, giving like 2LPA offers max. This college is a no-go for placements. 10% of my seniors have been placed, and it was miserable. Most of them didn't even care to join, but we were made to sit in placements as they made it mandatory.
content.Infrastructure: I don't live in the hostel as I am a day scholar, but I have heard from my classmates and seniors that they have big hall dorms where they have laid out like 15 bedsheets and you have to sleep like that, no personal rooms or such, and even have to share your bathroom. Just don't choose it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Chemistry, Botany, Zoology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Amazing college life and campus.

content.Placements: Placements are good and reputed companies come for placement interviews. About 75% of the students grab a remarkable package and many of them get satisfying internship opportunities. Even after internships, college provides you with counseling for further career planning. Not sure about the highest but the lowest package is around 5-6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are top class. We have a huge campus with each and every kind of facility available. There are separate buildings for each department. Practical laboratories are well built and equipped with all the necessary facilities. Hostels are clean and hygienic. The mess is huge.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Management (BBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: College has a very good faculty.

content.Placements: In MATS university approximately 70-80% students gets campus placements every year. From the 4th semester students starts getting internships and placements opportunities. The average package is 2-3lpa for the BBA students. Around 80% students gets internships through college.
content.Infrastructure: MATS University has a well developed infrastructure. There are sports and medical facilities available in the college. College has a canteen with the all types of fast foods available. College has Wi-Fi which can be accessed by the students. College has no hostel facility available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements.

content.Placements: Many top companies visit our college to recruit students. Almost 90% of students got placed in our college. Top recruiting companies are MRF, Ceat, TCS, etc. They offer good salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. Our college has a library. It provides issued books. We have a canteen. All classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are good, helpful, and well-qualified. They help us in making projects for placements. They are always available for students to clear their doubts. Exams are conducted in a very disciplined manner.

admission_overview.title: MATS University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Those students who want to gain admission at Mahaveer Academy of Technology and Sciences (MATS) need to register themselves on the official site and complete the application form. Students get shortlisted for admission based on their performance in the accepting exams, like JEE Main or CUET-PG. Refer to the information below to know the admission process:

admission_process.title: MATS University Raipur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mahaveer Academy of Technology and Science University (MATS University) offers 40 undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses across 12 different schools in the disciplines of Engineering & Technology, Management, Law, Fashion Design, Arts, Education, Sciences, Business Studies, Library Science & Physical Education.MATS Universityis approved by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and the All India Council of Technical Education (AICTE). The mode of application for all courses is online, and admission is bothmerit-basedandentrance exam-based. Apart from regular degree courses, the university also extends UG, PG, certificate, and diploma courses through distance education.Check details here.

MATS University Raipur offers merit-based admission to various UG, PG, and doctoral courses; however, the university also accepts the scores of several entrance exams for courses like BTech, MBA, MTech, and MCA. Listed in the table below are MATS University courses along with entrance exams accepted for respective admissions at the university:

For MATS University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to MATS University course admissions 2025:

MATS University admissions 2025 provide both merit and entrance-based criteria.Applicants have to navigate their way through all stages of the selection procedure to be admitted.The following is an outline of the 2025 MATS University admission process:
Step 1: MATS University Application Process 2025

The MATS University admission process 2025 starts with the application stage.Application forms can be obtained from the university's website. The form may be mailed by post or handed over to the concerned department at MATS University. Payment for the application and entrance test can be made through an online process and candidates have to attach two photocopies of online bank challan with the pay slip to the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

The UG, PG, and doctoral admissions are based on merit and an entrance exam.For BTech, scores from the entrance test JEE Main are used, while for MBA admission, scores from CAT, XAT, MAT, or any other similar management test are required. For MTech, a GATE score is required while in case of LL.M, a recognised law entrance exam or LSAT has to be cleared.B.Ed requires clearance of the university's entrance test by the candidate.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After completing the selection process, candidates need to participate in counselling for the particular course for which they are shortlisted. The merit list will be released in multiple rounds by MATS University. The shortlisted candidates will have to pay the admission fee within the provided time period in order to secure their seats.

faqs.question: What is the overall CAT percentile cutoff for MBA admission at MATS University?

But the medical care available is very supportive. We do have a spo...

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure and teachers are good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is a crucial aspect of any university. Our university was no exception when I was studying there. The infrastructure was considered normal, but it provided all the necessary facilities and resources that a student needed to excel in their studies. The campus had modern buildings and well-equipped classrooms with interactive whiteboards, projectors, and sound systems. The university had a vast library that was filled with books. Our university had a well-equipped computer lab with ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of MATS University.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available in the building. Classrooms are well-structured. There are separate rooms for laboratory, design, engineering, etc. Many books are available in the library. Academic books are also provided. I am a day scholar so I do not know about hostel facilities. But I have heard from friends that the hostels are good. The hostel fee is also affordable. Mess is available. It also has an emergency room. Sports are also conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is exhilarating and there are multiple technical events.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college then it's good enough to satisfy you. All types of necessities you'll find on campus. Some classes have air-conditioners but mostly don't. You will get a huge library, playground, and most sports are available but there's no hostel facility available. You will get Wi-Fi on the whole campus and the quality is also good. The conditions of the college are hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the university include air-conditioned and fully-furnished classrooms. The Wi-Fi zones are also created by the university. The library is full of informative and useful books, and all the related books are available at the library. The hostel is very good. The food offered at the hostel is tasty and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. There are hostels with separate wings for girls and boys. The quality of the mess is also good. There are good classrooms equipped with projectors. The library has all the books that will help us in our studies. The college has renovated hostels, medical support systems with a physiotherapy center, a modern gymnasium, a swimming pool, and a huge parking facility. Computer labs, a media lab, and a resource center comprise the physical IT infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the classrooms, knowledgeable faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is small, but it has a lot of facilities which are good like free Wi-Fi, a library, neat classrooms and labs. I am a day scholar, so I have no idea how does the food at the hostel taste. There is no mess or canteen in our college. Sports facilities are good here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MATS University.
reviews.review_text: Talking about the infrastructure, MATS Unversity was not big but we had a lot of fun there. The campus was good. The hostel was quite good during our course duration. But the food served was worse.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides all the facilities which we need. Classrooms are adequate, and smart classrooms are also available here. Almost all the books are available in the library. Labs are well-defined, and lab attendants were available to help us in every step of our practicals. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with out well qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are provided with AC. Digital classroom is also available. We can get so many useful books from the library regarding our courses. Wi-Fi is also available in our college. We could go for online studies also in the college. Sports is the most important part of our college.

Gandhinagar University's popular courses are BTech and MBA. The university offers BTech specialisation in Civil Engineering, CSE, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and others. Gandhinagar University BTech students are placed in top companies in various sectors. BTech students can work as Web Developer, Data Science Engineer, Automotive Developer, Robotics Engineer, and others.
Gandhinagar University is one of the eminent universities. The university offers an MBA specialisation in Finance, HR, Marketing, Aviation, Hospital & Healthcare Management, and others. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Business Analysts, Finance Managers, Compliance Analysts, Market Research Analysts, Investment Bankers and others. Below are some of the programmes offered by Gandhinagar University:

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College has good placements, supportive faculty members, and modern facilities.

content.Placements: 70 to 80 percent students from our batch got placed. The highest package offered is around 12 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA and the average package is 5 LPA to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Byju's and Tech Mahindra. 60 percent students also got internships in reputed companies like Reliance, Adani and local IT startups. The major roles offered are software developer, data analyst, business development associate and network engineer. Placements are good with decent opportunities for both core and IT fields.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is well maintained with facilities like Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, smart classrooms and well stocked library. Hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, proper medical facilities, and 24X7 water and electricity supply. The food served in the mess is hygienic and has both vegetarian and non vegetarian options. Sports facilities like cricket ground, volleyball court and indoor games are available for students. Campus environment is friendly and supports both academics and extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.title: College is amazing. Environment friendly, scalable for students, and much more.

content.Placements: About 80-85% of students are getting placed every year. The highest package is 14 LPA, while the lowest package is 5 LPA. The average package is 9.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Micron, TCS, Infosys, etc. Almost 90% of students got internships. They are placed in Infosys. Top roles are interns and managers.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are top-class. All the amenities are in use and are working appropriately. The quality of facilities in our hostel is at next level. They are providing delicious food. Medical facilities are also available. All types of games are been played on the campus.

courses_data.description: Gandhinagar University MBA admission 2025is open. Applicants need to qualify for rank in either MAT/XAT/CAT/CMAT and others are a must for admission to the MBA course. Applicants also need to qualify for the Eligibility & Selection Criteria. Applicants must have a graduation degree to be eligible for Gandhinagar University MBA courses. Check below to know more about Gandhinagar University MBA admission 2025:

faqs.question: What are the criteria for MBA at Gandhinagar University?
faqs.answer: Gandhinagar University offers MBA within two years. Applicants seeking admission to MBA courses must have a graduation degree. Further, admission to the MBA course is entrance-based. The institute accepts various entrance exams including MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT. To grab the seat, candidates are required to have a valid score in one entrance exam accepted by the university.

faqs.question: What is the cost of an MBA at Gandhinagar University?
faqs.answer: The cost of Gandhinagar University isINR 1.7 - 6.1 lakh. To secure admission, candidates are required to pay the course fee after getting shortlisted in the selection rounds. Candidates must have to pay another one-time fee at the time of admission. Further, candidates note that the given fee is as per the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: What is the admission process of Gandhinagar University?
faqs.answer: Gandhinagar University admissions are done through the Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC). For BTech and MBA courses, aspirants need to appear for the entrance namely,GUJCETandCMAT/MAT/XAT/CAT, respectively.

faqs.question: What is Gandhinagar Institute of Technology GUJCET cutoff?
faqs.answer: Gandhinagar Institute of Technology GUJCET cutoff 2024 was released for Round 3. The cutoff was released for different categories under HS quota. courses_data.name: Gandhinagar University MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Gandhinagar University MTech admission is open. The institute offers entrance-based admission to MTech courses. The accepts ACPC norms for admission. The applicants must have a BTech in their respective branch or equivalent from a recognised board. Candidates after filling out all the eligibility and selection criteria must apply online on the official website of Gandhinagar University to apply for admission. Check below to know complete details about Gandhinagar University MTech admission 2025:

faqs.question: Can I get admission to M.Tech at Gandhinagar University with 60% in graduation?
faqs.answer: Gandhinagar University offers 54 seats in the M.Tech programme. Applicants who are interested in M.Tech can apply for the admission form online. To be eligible for admission to MTech, the applicant must have BTech in respective branch or equivalent from a recognised board. Further, the college accepts and follow the ACPC rule for admission to M.Tech courses.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in M.Tech at Gandhinagar University?
faqs.answer: Gandhinagar University offers entrance-based admission to MTech. To be eligible for admission to M.Tech students are required to apply and appear for GATE and ACPC entrance exam and counselling. Further, students are required to fill out the basic eligibility i.e., must have a graduation degree from a recognised board.

faqs.question: What is the GUJCET counselling fee?
faqs.answer: Candidates can register for the GUJCET counselling and participate in the counselling without any fees. However, candidates need to pay the seat confirmation fees once the seat is allotted to them. The fees can be paid online using credit/debit card and net banking. Apart from it, candidates need to pay the GUJCET 2024 application fees. The fee can be paid online using a credit/debit card or internet banking or through any branch of SBI. The amount of application fees is similar for all categori

faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Gandhinagar University?
faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Gandhinagar University is around INR 40000 - INR 610220.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for admission to Gandhinagar University?
faqs.answer: The eligibility and selection criteria for all the courses at Gandhinagar University differ from all the courses. Candidates who want to be admitted to any courses at Gandhinagar University have to appear for entrance exams accepted by the college. Given below the table contains eligibility and selection criteria for Gandhinagar University courses:Course NameCommon EligibilitySelection CriteriaBTechClass 12 (PCM) or equivalent from a recognised boardGUJCET + ACPCMTechBE/BTech in respective branch or equivalent from a recognised boardACPCMBAAny Graduation+Entrance decided by GU/ACPCMAT,  XAT,  CAT,  CMATBScClass 12 with PCM/PCBACPCMScBSc in the relevant field of studies or equivalent from a recognised boardACPCBCAClass 12 in any streamGandhinagar University, based on meritBComClass 12 in any streamGandhinagar University, based on merit

faqs.question: Is there an entrance for admission to Gandhinagar University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Gandhinagar University accepts entrance exams for admission to all its courses. The college accepts scores of exams, such as ACPC/MAT/XAT/CAT/CMAT and Gandhinagar University Exam. To get admisison, candidates are required to have a valid score in  entrance exam accepted and conducted by the university. After completeing the criteria, applicants need to visit the official website of college to fill out the application form.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Gandhinagar University?
faqs.answer: Gandhinagar University offers entrance-based admission to all its courses. The college accepts ACPC, MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT and Admission Committee of Gandhinagar University, based on Merit. Additionally, candidates are also required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria i.e. pass Class 12 for UG courses and Gradution degree for admission to PG courses.

faqs.question: What are the courses that Gandhinagar University offers?
faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, the college offers BTech, BCA, BSc and BCom and two courses i.e. M.Tech and MBA at postgradute level to students. Admission to all the courses is entrance based. To get admission, candidates are required to have valid score in accepted entrance exam. Candidate seeking admission to any courses can apply and appear for the exam for admission.

placement_data.title: Gandhinagar University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The University has a well-equipped Industry Interaction and Placement Cell , which facilitates all types of placemen related activities. The placement cell organises groo ming sessions, orientation programs and mock interview sessions for students. The University also organises summer internship programs to provide students hands-on corporate experience.

Gandhinagar University average package offered during placements 2023 was INR 4 LPA . The percentage of students placed was 95% and more than 125 companies visited the campus in 2023. The University has established 15 active MoUs with companies for better placements.
Download: Gandhinagar_University_Brochure_2023

faqs.question: What is the total fee for BA at Gandhinagar University?
faqs.answer: The BA programme at Gandhinagar Universityis an undergraduate degree, that is offered in both three- and four-year formats. The total fee for the BA course includes different components such as tuition fees, registration fees, hostel fees, etc. Candidates need to pay the registration fee before admission, after receiving the offer letter from the college. This payment is important for securing a seat in the course and finalising the enrollment. To learn about the tuition fee and other components, refer to the table given below: Fee Components Amount Hostel Fees INR 1.44 lakh Tuition Fees INR 54,000 to INR 72,000 Registration Fees INR 10,000 Total Fees INR 2.08 Lacs to INR 2.26 lakh The fee amount mentioned is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change.

reviews.review_heading: College has good placements, supportive faculty members, and modern facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is well maintained with facilities like Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, smart classrooms and well stocked library. Hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, proper medical facilities, and 24X7 water and electricity supply. The food served in the mess is hygienic and has both vegetarian and non vegetarian options. Sports facilities like cricket ground, volleyball court and indoor games are available for students. Campus environment is friendly and suppor...

reviews.review_heading: College is amazing. Environment friendly, scalable for students, and much more.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are top-class. All the amenities are in use and are working appropriately. The quality of facilities in our hostel is at next level. They are providing delicious food. Medical facilities are also available. All types of games are been played on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are excellent, except for the Wi-Fi, as it's just terrible. Classrooms are well-equipped, with good studying space. The library is also very good. Hostel rooms are quite smaller than expected. Besides this, everything is fine. This is a ragging-free campus, and Gujaratis are always friendly by nature.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Labs, classrooms, and the library are very well-designed. The canteen is awesome with AC in it. Sports activities are also good. There is a big ground in the backyard of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Very good and nice college for engineering according to me.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Labs, classrooms, and library are very well designed and give you very good vibe. Canteen is awesome with AC in it. Sports activities are also good. There is a big ground in backyard of college.

reviews.review_heading: My college, my opinion, my verdict.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has decent infrastructure. It is surrounded by lush green fields. There are AC rooms all over the campus, and even our canteen has AC. All the rooms are well furnished. Our college sometimes faces electricity outages due to its rural location, but it has a generator that restores electricity within 5 to 10 minutes. Our college is currently building its hostel, which is under development. The area also has PG accommodations at fair rates. Our canteen offers decent food, but the prices ...

reviews.review_heading: Very good and nice College for engineering according to myself.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Labs, classrooms, library are very vell designed and gives you very good wine. Faculty members are very polite and vell behaving towards students and knowledgeable also. Canteen is awesome with AC in it. Sports activities is also good. There is a big ground in backyard of college.

reviews.review_heading: Good College for engineering, according to me, good infrastructure, campus, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Labs, classrooms, and library are very well designed and give you a very good vibe. Canteen is awesome with AC in it. Sports activities are also good. There is a big ground in backyard of college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our Gandhinagar University.
reviews.review_text: Our Gandhinagar University is located in a village. But, its environment is very nice because there is no pollution in the college area. The infrastructure of our college is very nice and beautiful. There is one classroom for every 6 ACs. There are many smart boards as well.

reviews.review_heading: If you have average marks in 12th and don't have much money, then you should consider this college.
reviews.review_text: Gandhinagar University College's infrastructure is old but good. The college is in a village, but it feels nice to be in the college. In many areas, the internet doesn't support it. This college has less fees, which is why this college is better than other colleges. The college doesn't have a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college is amazing and must visit.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is very good and easy. Wi-Fi and labs are amazing and advanced, so we can learn and practice more subjects and gain skills. In our hostel, the staff provides everything you want in it.

reviews.review_heading: At Gandhinagar University, the placement percentage in 2024 was 85%.
reviews.review_text: At this college, Wi-Fi is available. We have lab facilities. There are air-conditioned classrooms. The canteen food is tasty and good. The canteen facilities are good and clean. Sports are there like cricket, football, table tennis, etc. We can play every sport in the playground.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good faculty members, decent placements in previous years.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and everyone can access it free of cost. The classroom infrastructure is also very good. The library is very well-accompanied by lots of books and journals. The hostel facilities for students are also very good. The quality of food is hygienic, the canteen is well-maintained, and the medical and sports facilities are also impressive.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and transportation facilities are very affordable and also safe for both students and faculty members. They provide a great place to live, with good food, a hygienic area and a lot more space included in college. Also, they provide facilities for transportation.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good faculties, decent placements, green and clean campus with quality teaching
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite decent. Wi-Fi facility is quite disgusting sometimes but it is manegable. Moreover, the classes and labs are decent. The tried up hostel is food with okay food quality. The mess in college campus is quite good with good taste and quality. Medical facilities of college is good with decent sports activities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Anna University - Madurai Regional Campus provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering and Business & Management Studies, and have a fee structure of around INR 35,000 to 50,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM.

faqs.answer:
A:    Anna University - Madurai Regional Campus has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Civil and Structural Engineering.
Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination.
Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.
Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible.
Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible.
Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

review_summary.college_name: Anna University - Madurai Regional Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering, Madurai Regional Campus - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure and facilities are quite good, but the placements are average.

content.Placements: I am a mechanical student, and I think the placements for my course are average. The highest package offered in my course is 2.5 LPA. Companies like Foxconn and Tata participate in placements. For internships, students have to search on their own. The roles offered in our course include quality engineer and designer.
content.Infrastructure: In college, facilities are quite good, and it feels peaceful for me. Our department enjoys more activities than any other department. Regarding labs, we often visit labs in other colleges. The hostel is better than the college, and the food quality is average. Initially, it is comfortable, but over time, it will change.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering, Madurai Regional Campus - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: There are good faculty members among us who are very helpful. The infrastructure is really good.

content.Placements: In 2024, 90% of students were placed in campus interviews. The highest package from top companies is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include ZOHO, TVS, and WIPRO. All students got internships at Hyundai, TVS, and Ashok Leyland.
content.Infrastructure: In Anna University Madurai campus, the infrastructure is very good, and we have Wi-Fi connection, computer labs, IoT lab, mechatronics lab, etc. In the hostel, there are many facilities, including a gym, and the quality of food is very good. The medical facility is also good; whatever happens, they immediately arrange first aid. Overall, everything is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, Madurai Regional Campus - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college provides placement opportunities. Top recruiting companies are ZOHO, TCS, Great Innova, Aptean, Cyperplus, etc. Top roles offered are developer, tester, and data analyst. Many students got placed on campus and off campus.
content.Infrastructure: We have a well-equipped lab with multiple computers. We have separate hostels for boys and girls within the campus. The hostels are safe.
content.Faculty: Our faculty members are helpful. They are well-educated and exhibit excellent behavior. They conduct webinars to prepare us for the industry, which is very beneficial. We have good mentors to guide us through our course. Our college has intelligent people. The semester exams are quite challenging in comparison to other private engineering colleges.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, Madurai Regional Campus - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Anna University - Madurai Regional Campus.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is 70%. The salary package offered is around 2 LPA - 6 LPA. Students got internships in Zoho, Cyberplus, etc. Our college provides placement training.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is well-equipped with labs, air-conditioners, and advanced smart boards. Our college provides separate hostels for boys and girls. Our canteen is on campus.
content.Faculty: Our college has highly trained and supportive teachers. Assistant teachers support us. The pass percentage is above 90%.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, Madurai Regional Campus - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am disappointed in my life. I got a seat in University College of Engineering Ramanathapuram.

content.Placements: Only around 15% of students got placement offers from here. Mahendra, KEC International and TCS visit here. The highest salary offered was Rs. 32,000 per month, and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 6,000 per month. Around 35% of students got internships in Orient Systems Pvt Ltd. SCADA engineer, HVAC engineer, electrical engineer and commissioning engineer roles are offered here.
content.Infrastructure: There was no lab facility here. If we need to go to the lab, we should visit nearby private colleges like Sathak Engineering College, etc. There is the very worst infrastructure here. Staff members are also not good, and they are not qualified. The hostel is now looking fine, but non-vegetarian food is not served. The food served is of a low quality. There was not even one ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fire and Industrial Safety - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with college for enjoyment as well as placements.

review_content.Placements: Mostly 80 percentage of students got placements every year. The highest salary package is 6 Lacs per annum. The lowest salary package is 3.4 Lacs per annum and the average salary package is 2 Lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies are Tata, Ford, Mahindra, Shell, Indian Oil etc. There is no internship provided by college. The students have to get their internships on their own. The top roles offered are Safety Engineer, trainee, Safety checker etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has lot of facilities for the students. There is no Wi-Fi everywhere. Most of the classrooms are well structured and included with projectors for smart classes. The hostel facilities are good but the fee of hostel and mess is so high. The mess food is acceptable. The college don't give importance to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fire and Industrial Safety - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: My college was one of the best colleges in that city. It was a nice experience to study there.

review_content.Placements: Placements at this college are good. Lots of companies from India and abroad come here, like Wipro, TCS, Havells, etc. Placement cells are very active. The placement percentage is around 80–90%, which is a good number. Our college also helps with placements and invites top companies. Companies hire students at a good package, which is around INR 2.5 lacs to INR 5 lacs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is very nice. The college campus is very spacious, and the hostel facilities are very nice. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. And all the sports facilities are available in college. A hostel facility is available for students coming from long distances. Food in a mess is nice, like home. Everything is maintained properly.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Airline and Airport Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good at placements and training. But bad at infrastructure and fee structure.

content.Placements: 99% of students achieve placements in my college. Salary ranges from Rs.15,000 to Rs.45,000, with an average of Rs.25,000, depending on the roles. Recruiting companies such as Indigo, Celibi, SpiceJet, Air India, etc, visit our college. The most common job role for freshers is cabin crew.
content.Infrastructure: I'm a day scholar, so I don't have much knowledge about hostel life, but I've heard things about it from my friends. Facilities in the hostel are average, and the food quality is poor. They have medical facilities, but only for first aid. This college is not a platform to showcase students' talents in sports and other games. The college doesn't even have an NCC. The library has a minimum level of books.

content.Infrastructure: This college has best facilities, like neat and clean classroom, fast Wi-Fi connection, hostel, canteen food, library, labs, etc. The sports team is organizing sports and games tournaments, and medical facilities are also provided .

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My honest review about my college.

review_content.Placements: DY Patil Institute of Management had a separate placement cell. Teachers in the placement cell guided and coached us in all aspects of attending an interview. We were coached in such a way that we gained the confidence to crack any interview without fear.
review_content.Infrastructure: I did not experience the hostel facilities or the mess food at DY Patil Institute of Management. However, I had friends who stayed in the college hostel. Since I never visited them, I can't say anything specific about the hostel or the mess food, but they always seemed to enjoy facilities provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: College Life at Dr. D. Y. Patil Institute Of Management & Entrepreneur Development, Pune.

review_content.Placements: This is the first batch of MCA so there is no alumni network present here, and also no placement history is present. But the college is trying to provide good opportunities to the students, but I can't say anything clearly about it. It can be improved in the future as the new batches come and go.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the institute is good. A lot of construction work in ongoing for future. Overall, it's a good infrastructure and the college has all the necessary facilities in the campus. Wi-Fi, computer labs and a canteen are present here.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: DY Patil Institute of Management had a separate placement cell. Teachers in the placement cell guided and coached us in all aspects of attending an interview. We were coached in such a way that we gained the confidence to crack any interview without fear.
content.Infrastructure: I did not experience the hostel facilities or the mess food at DY Patil Institute of Management. However, I had friends who stayed in the college hostel. Since I never visited them, I can't say anything specific about the hostel or the mess food, but they always seemed to enjoy facilities provided.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College Life at Dr. D. Y. Patil Institute Of Management & Entrepreneur Development, Pune.

content.Placements: This is the first batch of MCA so there is no alumni network present here, and also no placement history is present. But the college is trying to provide good opportunities to the students, but I can't say anything clearly about it. It can be improved in the future as the new batches come and go.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the institute is good. A lot of construction work in ongoing for future. Overall, it's a good infrastructure and the college has all the necessary facilities in the campus. Wi-Fi, computer labs and a canteen are present here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated BBA+MBA - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Disappointed with placements in 2025, but good faculty and great infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in jobs is very low, as the college is not able to bring in companies. The college claims to offer high packages, but in reality, it's not true. The packages are low. Since it's newly opened, there are not many companies. The top roles offered in our course are company managers, HR, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is great. It's a big university and well-made. The Wi-Fi is pretty good and has a good range, but sometimes it doesn't work. There are 2 computer labs and one very big library, which is maintained nicely. Classrooms are also good. The hostels are still being built, so I can't say much.

reviews_list.batch_info: Integrated BBA+MBA - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It's an average business school with basic programs and no placement guarantee.

review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is not yet completed in college, it's under construction, and the recent sports event was also organized. It is good and Wi-Fi facility is available in the full college, even in the corridors too. The classes are luxurious, but the canteen food quality is average, that's it.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are IIM and IIT qualified, as there are some IPS officers. The curriculum is very structured and regularly updated to meet industry demands. Semester exams are moderately challenging. The overall pass percentage is fairly high, and regular assignments are being given.

review_summary.college_name: Prestige University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BBA+MBA - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Disappointed with placements in 2025, but good faculty and great infrastructure.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in jobs is very low, as the college is not able to bring in companies. The college claims to offer high packages, but in reality, it's not true. The packages are low. Since it's newly opened, there are not many companies. The top roles offered in our course are company managers, HR, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is great. It's a big university and well-made. The Wi-Fi is pretty good and has a good range, but sometimes it doesn't work. There are 2 computer labs and one very big library, which is maintained nicely. Classrooms are also good. The hostels are still being built, so I can't say much.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BBA+MBA - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It's an average business school with basic programs and no placement guarantee.

content.Infrastructure: The hostel is not yet completed in college, it's under construction, and the recent sports event was also organized. It is good and Wi-Fi facility is available in the full college, even in the corridors too. The classes are luxurious, but the canteen food quality is average, that's it.
content.Faculty: The teachers are IIM and IIT qualified, as there are some IPS officers. The curriculum is very structured and regularly updated to meet industry demands. Semester exams are moderately challenging. The overall pass percentage is fairly high, and regular assignments are being given.

faqs.answer: If you're looking for admission via management quota, it is not at all possible. You cannot give donations and take a seat. A candidate must have a 10+2 qualification with minimum 50% marks . Additionally he or she must have valid scores in all India entrance test such as CUET, CAT, MAT etc. After the application forms are out in their official websites, students need to pay 1000 to submit application and fill the form . admission_process.title: Prestige University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: ThePrestige University admissionsstart with an eligibility check. Eligible students can go through the rest of the steps, including the selection process, and admission confirmation. Interested students can see below the steps to complete thePrestige University admission process:
Application Process 2026
Interested students can check the official site to apply online. The application has to be submitted with documents and application fees. Students need to submit the form before the last date.
Selection Process

The institute selects students mainly on an entrance basis. Students have to first clear the basic eligibility. Eligible students have to submit valid scores of the accepted exams. The university accepts valid scores of exams, such as CUET / JEE / SAT / ACT (or PU Aptitude Test) for BTech and BSc courses. Additional rounds, such as application screening, SOP submission, and GDPI rounds are also conducted.
For the PG courses, the university accepts MAT/ PU-Test/ GMAT/ GRE/ CAT scores.
FinalAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. Selected students have to report for verification of documents and pay thePrestige University feesto complete the process.

reviews_list.review_title: Qualified faculty and relevant curriculum with manageable exams.

review_content.Placements: Currently, I am pursuing this course. I hope approximately 70% of students will be successful in getting the placements. Regarding internships, around 50% of students secured internships on their own with companies like Decathlon, Accenture, etc. The most common roles offered in this course is court room practices, legal aid camps, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The law department boasts average facilities, including Wi-Fi across the campus. Classrooms are furnished with basic necessities like smart boards and projectors for a better learning experience. The library offers a vast range of books, journals and other resources to support students academic needs.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with accounts teachers.

review_content.Placements: Only a small percentage of individuals who pursued a B.Com degree did not secure placements, not because of their lack of capability, but rather because they chose not to actively seek employment. Some students already had their own businesses, while others aimed to pursue further studies. However, it is worth noting that even after two years of graduating from university, there are still placement opportunities available.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college boasts excellent infrastructure and facilities, including labs, a seminar hall, a conference room, a library, a sports room, and a spacious ground for football and cricket. The hostel facilities were satisfactory, with comfortable rooms and good quality food in the mess. Fortunately, I never had to experience any medical emergencies during my time there.
