course_faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at Pacific University expensive?
course_faqs.answer: No, it is not expensive to pursue an MBA at the Pacific Academy of Higher Education and Research University also known as Pacific University. The 1st year fee is INR 4,100 in Pacific University for MBA students. The total tuition fee is INR 81.4 thousand for a complete course at Pacific University for MBA students. You need to pay the admission fee during joining of the course in your 1st year of MBA when you are joining. The placement is good. The highest package is INR 12 Lakhs per annum.

course_faqs.question: Is Pacific University a good university for MBA?
course_faqs.answer: The Pacific Academy of higher education and Research University also called Pacific University is a good university for MBA students. It is located in Udaipur Rajasthan. It ranked 34th in Rajasthan among 70 colleges. It ranked 1201 out of 1400 by QS World University rankings. Also 96 by US UNI (University). The highest package is INR 12 Lakhs per annum in Pacific University for MBA. The average package is INR 4.7 Lakhs per annum in Pacific University for MBA students.

course_faqs.question: What is the cost of studying MBA from Pacific University?
course_faqs.answer: The total course fee is inclusive of tuition fee, security deposit, and enrolment fee. Candidates have to make payment after the final selection to confirm their candidature. Pacific University MBA tuition fee ranges from INR 42,500 to INR 3 lakh. This fee range is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to revision and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the course fees for four years BPharm in Pacific University?
overview_faqs.answer: Some of the components included in the Pacific University fee structure are tuition fee, hostel fee, enrollment fee, etc. A few of these are one-time payable, while some have to be paid annually or semester-wise. Pacific University BPharm tuition fee is INR 2.8 Lakh. Additionally, the hostel fee is INR 1.5 Lakh and one-time fee is INR 1,000. The mentioned fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at Pacific College of Pharmacy, Pacific University?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Pacific College of Pharmacy, Pacific University is approximately INR 100000 - INR 280000.

overview_faqs.question: Is it expensive to study BSc from Pacific University?
overview_faqs.answer: The BSc course fee in Pacific University is not very expensive. For the three-year courses, the total tuition fee ranges from INR 75,000 to INR 2.1 lakh. The fee structure varies based on chosen specialisation. Hence, some of the BSc courses are more expensive than the others. Moreover, apart from tuition fee, there are other components included in the fee structure as well. Some of these are enrollment fees, hostel fees, transport fees, etc. The fee range given here is as per the data curated from the official website/sanctioning body. It is however still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: Pacific University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fire Technology and Industrial Safety Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It provides good placement every year.

content.Placements: 70% of students were placed in this course. The highest package was approximately 3.4 LPA. There were several companies like Zinc and many companies. Approximately 70% of students got internships in several companies as a safety officer. It depends on our percentage and our experience.
content.Infrastructure: There were many types of facilities provided by college like training sessions. There were lab, Wi-Fi, and library. The classroom was very good, neat, and clean.
content.Faculty: Our teachers were very helpful. They were very supportive. They always encourage us. This course curriculum was relevant. It made the students ready for industries and companies. It depends on our study. The pass percentage was above 40 percent. Mock drills taught us how to do our job, and every teacher explained their experiences. Our director, principal, and teachers were very supportive.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Don’t aim for this college, it is the worst college ever.

content.Placements: There are 60 students enrolled in the BBA program. There are no top recruiting companies for my course. The overall undergraduate placement rate is around 60% (likely across all UG courses, including BBA). The broad consensus is that the course is relevant and aims to prepare students for the real world. It is described as "industry ready" and built with future applications in mind.
content.Infrastructure: There is not that much good infrastructure. They have a library and classrooms. According to one student review, internships (with a stipend of 6-7K/month) are available in the senior year, though specific companies aren’t named. It does not have a high recommendation from the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Qualified faculty and relevant curriculum with manageable exams.

content.Placements: Currently, I am pursuing this course. I hope approximately 70% of students will be successful in getting the placements. Regarding internships, around 50% of students secured internships on their own with companies like Decathlon, Accenture, etc. The most common roles offered in this course is court room practices, legal aid camps, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The law department boasts average facilities, including Wi-Fi across the campus. Classrooms are furnished with basic necessities like smart boards and projectors for a better learning experience. The library offers a vast range of books, journals and other resources to support students academic needs.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with accounts teachers.

content.Placements: Only a small percentage of individuals who pursued a B.Com degree did not secure placements, not because of their lack of capability, but rather because they chose not to actively seek employment. Some students already had their own businesses, while others aimed to pursue further studies. However, it is worth noting that even after two years of graduating from university, there are still placement opportunities available.
content.Infrastructure: The college boasts excellent infrastructure and facilities, including labs, a seminar hall, a conference room, a library, a sports room, and a spacious ground for football and cricket. The hostel facilities were satisfactory, with comfortable rooms and good quality food in the mess. Fortunately, I never had to experience any medical emergencies during my time there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hotel Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has excellent teachers and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college provides excellent placements. More than 80% of students are placed. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Taj, Oberoi, ITC, The Lalit, Radisson Blu, etc., visit our campus. Many students get foreign placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure. The library is excellent. Our college has four main departments, including the front office, food production, food and beverage service department, and housekeeping department.

admission_overview.college_name: Pacific University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application, Last Date

admission_process.title: Pacific University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Pacific University admissions2025are based on merit as well as different entrance exam scores. Pacific University offers over 140 undergraduate (UG), postgraduate (PG), Certificate, Diploma, & doctoral courses across 19 departments including Engineering, Management, Dentistry, Pharmacy, Computer Application, and Hotel Management, etc. To get admission to the university, candidates can fill out the application form in both online & offline modes.

Before applying, candidates must ensure that they are meeting the eligibility criteria for their desired programme. Admission to UG programs, such as BCA, BSc are based on merit in the last qualifying examination. Some popular courses offered by Pacific University along with their eligibility criteria and selection criteria are listed below:
Course Name
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria

Class 12 from a recognised board in the relevant stream

Pacific University admission process include registration, selection and admission confirmation. The selection criteria vary course-wise at the university. Candidates seeking admission can check below the steps to get a seat in Pacific University:
STEP 1: Pacific University Application Process 2025

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online for their preferred course. Aspirants need to pay an application fee of INR 1,250 to register for a course. The application process include filling out of details, document submission and fee payment.
STEP 2: Pacific University Selection 2025

Applicants are selected based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for some of the courses. For programmes such as BTech, BPharm, MBA, etc., admissions are based on national-level entrance exams. The university accepts CAT, MAT, ATMA, JEE Main, GPAT, etc.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment 2025
Once selected, candidates will receive an offer letter. Shortlisted aspirants are then required to pay a course fee to confirm their seats.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for Pacific University BPharm course?
faqs.answer: Candidates wanting to get into the BPharm course of the university must meet the minimum eligibility requirements. The aspirants who are Class 12 or equivalent exam pass with Science +Maths/Biology subjects can apply. In addition, it should have been passed from a recognised board. Candidates applying for admission must have the pass certificate/mark sheet (original/copies). This document is required for verification purposes.

placement_report.college_name: Pacific University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: Pacific University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Pacific University placement cell has reinforced its credibility with regular recruiters. There has been a notable increase in the number of offers extended by each company, with the average compensation experiencing a remarkable rise of 21.18% compared to the previous year. Job roles such as Relationship Managers, HR Recruiters, Portfolio Managers, Education B2B Marketing, Media and Advertising, Digital Marketing, and Financial/Data Analytics are being provided in accordance with the evolving trends. A majority of students have secured pre-placement opportunities before the conclusion of their second year. As per the placement report released by the college over 80 companies were a part of Pacific University placements 2025. The key placement highlights are:
Highest Package: INR 17 LPA
Average Package: INR 8.75 LPA

hostel.description: The university has seven spacious, well-designed and properly furnished separate hostels for boys and girls; including different ones for Undergraduate and Postgraduate students. Hostel rooms are furnished with double bed, study table, wardrobes and has an attached bath and toilet, with 24 hours hot water supply.Separate common rooms with color television with DTH and facilities for indoor games are available in each hostel room.

library.description: The university has a multiple library of 1 lac.sq.ft. plinth area with a rich collection of about 2,50,000 books, 1000 national and 400 international journals subscribed annually, 2000 working papers and many other resources like thesis (350), student's project reports (2000), CD’s (2000) and videos (150) with several Indian & international editions on various topics.Students can avail the facility of online journals and e-books provided through Ebsco, Delnet, Sage etc

paragraphs: No, it is not expensive to pursue an MBA at the Pacific Academy of Higher Education and Research University also known as Pacific University. The 1st year fee is INR 4,100 in Pacific University for MBA students. The total tuition fee is INR 81.4 thousand for a complete course at Pacific University for MBA students. You need to pay the admission fee during joining of the course in your 1st year of MBA when you are joining. The placement is good. The highest package is INR 12 Lakhs per annum.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

For all other UG and PG courses, aspirants must appear for MGMU CET conducted by MGM University. Selected aspirants have to pay the programme fees to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.answer: MGM Institute of Management and Research offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. The institute offers BBA (Hons)/ Hons. with Research, BCom (Hons)/ Hons. with Research at UG and MBA, Executive MBA at the PG levels. The institute also offers a three-year PhD programme. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

review_summary.college_name: MGM Institute of Management and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA (Hons./ Hons. with Research) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Life at MGM college, placement campus.

content.Placements: 25% of students are placed. There are local placements the highest package is 3 PA. College does not provide internships we have to get on our own. College only provides 1-2 students internship and placement for them.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi on the whole campus also 2 computer labs and a library and one reading room. The college provides a hostel and mess also there is a gym and other sports such as cricket, football badminton, etc. The quality of the hostel and mess is good and medical facilities are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The campus is damn big and all classrooms have AC also in the laboratory.

content.Placements: From the third semester students are eligible for campus placement and there is lots of companies like Flipkart Amazon etc. The highest package of college is only I have listened is 2lac per annum and very few percentage of chances to get placement so after I get the degree I want to grow my own business.
content.Infrastructure: AC and non-AC with two beds and three beds all are there. Hostel meals change through seasons and the meals are great than others if comparing. Hostel affordability is easy and mess feels are only 45000 in each year very cheap if comparing the quality of food. Hostel Fee: INR 100000 per year.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with college.

content.Placements: In our college, nearly 100% of students are placed in my course. The average salary package is 4 LPA. There are various recruiting companies that are there to provide the best placement. Almost 100% of students got internships from my course. Company names are yours and others'. Every student from a different specialisation got a role as per their needs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very attractive and impressive. Indoor and outdoor sports facilities are available, and a canteen provides quality and tasty food. There's Wi-Fi-connected on the whole campus, and there is a library with a good collection of books.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The course curriculum needs to be updated but faculty is dynamic.

content.Placements: Around 80 % of the students got placed. The highest package was of 5.3 Lacs, the average package was around 3 Lacs and the lowest package was of 2.4 Lacs. Top recruiting companies are HDFC LTD, Asian paints. Around 40% of students got the internship and the most prominent company was BAJAJ. Top role was Assistant Manager.
content.Infrastructure: The institute is fully equipped with all the necessary infrastructure. The quality of food was good, especially college has 3 canteens. MGM has its own cricket ground along with basketball court, football court and badminton court as well. Around 3-4 mess options are available within the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied by the college because of its placements, teaching staff, etc.

content.Placements: Placement for the 2017-19 batch was huge. About 70% of students were placed. The average package offer by the companies was 3 lac. The companies came for the recruitment were ICICI Bank, Hdfc housing finance, Jeevansathi. com, Ecom express, etc. Most of the students got placed with good packages. The students were satisfied. About internship, the students had to find it on their own. But there was little support from the college in terms of making the projects.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good. The director made changes for the betterment of students. The hall was renovated, the availability of the books in the library was also good. There was book research centre and journals were provided by the college to get benefits out of it for the students. Classroom was also neat and good.

admission_overview.college_name: MGM Institute of Management and Research Admission 2026: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_overview.title: MGM Institute of Management and Research Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: MGM Institute of Management and Research admissions are entrance-based for most of the courses. The institute accepts scores in MGMU CET and MGMU PET conducted by MGM University. The institute also accepts national or state-level entrance exams for specific courses. MGM Institute of Management and Research offers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. BBA and MBA are the popular courses offered by the institute. Candidates can apply online for the preferred programme.

eligibility_selection.title: MGM Institute of Management and Research Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: MGM Institute of Management and Research selects candidates based on their entrance exam scores. Candidates also need to meet the eligibility criteria to apply for a course. A minimum of Class 12 is required for UG and graduation for PG programmes. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for MGM Institute of Management and Research courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 from a recognised board with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)

courses_table.eligibility: BCom or BCom (Hons) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)

faqs.answer: Aspirants need to complete BCom or BCom (Hons) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for MCom programme at MGM Institute of Management and Research. Candidates must have documents proving their eligibility for verification.
faqs.question: Who can apply for MCom at MGM Institute of Management and Research?

faqs.answer: Aspirants need to complete Class 12 from a recognised board with a minimum of 50% aggregate to apply for BCom (Hons)/ Hons. with Research. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for reserved category candidates. Hence, aspirants with 61% in Class 12 can apply for BCom.
faqs.question: Can I apply for BCom with 61% in Class 12 at MGM Institute of Management and Research?

admission_process.title: MGM Institute of Management and Research Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: MGM Institute of Management and Research admissionsare open. Candidates need to apply online to participate in the selection rounds. Aspirants can get seat in the institute based on their entrance exam scores. Check below the steps for MGM Institute of Management and Research admission process:
1. MGM Institute of Management and Research Application Process 2026
Aspirants need to register online for the preferred course. Candidates have to fill out the form and pay INR 2,000 for a course. The application fees for admission and MGMU PET is INR 5,000.
2. Selection

Aspirants need to appear for MGMU CET for UG and PG courses. Candidates are selected for PhD programme based on their score in MGMU PET. Aspirants can also apply with a score in CAT, MAT, CMAT, ATMA, MAH MBA CET, etc. for MBA programme.
3. Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute releases the merit list on the dashboard. Selected candidates have to come for document verification round. Aspirants also need to pay theMGM Institute of Management and Research feesto confirm their seat.

The institute offers seats to candidates based on their entrance exam scores. Selected aspirants have to pay the course fees. The total fees includes tuition fees, eligibility fees, caution money deposit, student activities, etc. Check below MGM Institute of Management and Research fees and intake:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

courses_data.description: MGM Institute of Management and Research offers MBA for two-years in full-time mode at the PG level. The course is divided into semesters. During the course, students need to choose a specialisation from General Management/ Executive Management, Finance/ Investment Banking, Marketing/ Brand Management, etc. Candidates who have completed graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate can apply for MBA. Admission to MBA programme is entrance-based. A total of 180 seats are available in MBA.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at MGM Institute of Management and Research?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate to apply for MBA at MGM Institute of Management and Research. Aspirants belonging to reserved category can apply for MBA with 45% and above aggregate in graduation.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted for MBA at MGM Institute of Management and Research?
faqs.answer: Candidates with a score in CAT, MAT, CMAT, ATMA, MAH MBA CET, etc. can get admission in MBA programme at MGM Institute of Management and Research. Aspirants can also appear for MGMU CET conducted by the university for admission to MBA course.

reviews.review_heading: Life at MGM college, placement campus.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi on the whole campus also 2 computer labs and a library and one reading room. The college provides a hostel and mess also there is a gym and other sports such as cricket, football badminton, etc. The quality of the hostel and mess is good and medical facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is damn big and all classrooms have AC also in the laboratory.
reviews.review_text: AC and non-AC with two beds and three beds all are there. Hostel meals change through seasons and the meals are great than others if comparing. Hostel affordability is easy and mess feels are only 45000 in each year very cheap if comparing the quality of food. Hostel Fee: INR 100000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very attractive and impressive. Indoor and outdoor sports facilities are available, and a canteen provides quality and tasty food. There's Wi-Fi-connected on the whole campus, and there is a library with a good collection of books.

reviews.review_heading: The course curriculum needs to be updated but faculty is dynamic.
reviews.review_text:
The institute is fully equipped with all the necessary infrastructure. 
The quality of food was good, especially college has 3 canteens. 
MGM has its own cricket ground along with basketball court, football court and badminton court as well. 
Around 3-4 mess options are available within the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by the college because of its placements, teaching staff, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. The director made changes for the betterment of students. The hall was renovated, the availability of the books in the library was also good. There was book research centre and journals were provided by the college to get benefits out of it for the students. Classroom was also neat and good.

reviews.review_heading: Best campus of the Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: In the college there are so many good facilities available for my course and infrastructure is also good. For many work and online work there are Wi-Fi, computer lab, huge library, classroom with projectors available. There are three hostels available in campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college. All the staff members are supportive.
reviews.review_text: Our institute has a library with all the books regarding the courses, and you will find other books also. There are computers labs for the students, and a reading room is also available for the students. Classrooms are high-class and are cleaned every day. Our college organises one sports session in a week.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MGM Institute of Management and Research, Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: The library is well maintained with the latest journals and new edition of all relevant books. Classrooms are very clean and comfortable for all the students. The college provides the latest technology in all the classrooms, which give an edge to this institute compared to other institutes.

reviews.review_heading: A placed to learn and explore and learn for lifetime.
reviews.review_text: MGM have good class infrastructure in marathwada region, all facilities are available over there may be internet facility or library facility. Also lab for project, computer lab were available, every thing what a student need was available at IOM.

reviews.review_heading: I was very satisfied with my college but more practical knowledge should be provided.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college was very good. There were good facilities provided by the library regarding the availability of books, journals etc. The infrastructure of the classroom was good. There was ebook research centre available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: MGM Institute of Management and Research, Aurangabad is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the high-class facilities that today's student's generation needs. They believe in making the students more focused. Our college provides many computers for students, so they can use their work in a great manner. Our college provides a huge two sports grounds, 1 huge canteen and a huge MGM hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms with projectors that enhance the teaching, is maintained library with the latest journals and newspapers. I wanted a hostelite, but have learned from few friends that hostels had all facilities of satisfactory level, major relief for parents. strict entry and exit timings of hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and maybe there are parking problems in our college as we lost bikes for which college is not responsible. Wi-Fi is not good. Classrooms, library and computer labs are good, but computers are not working properly. There are no study labs.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good campus environment, student-friendly infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like a library, reading rooms, Wi-Fi, and digital classrooms. They also provide clean washrooms, computer labs, hostels for boys and girls. There is an auditorium on campus. MGM Hospital is near to our campus, for a medical facility. Indoor and outdoor games, sports ground, badminton court, swimming pool and all sports equipment are provided. We have Wi-Fi connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because during the admissions the promises given are not put into action.
reviews.review_text: Facilities for girls are to be provided like clean washrooms, restrooms, sanitary pads, medical facilities, etc. A watchman should be alloted for the MBA department so that the other colleges students won't come in our college and create nuisance. Helping faculty members are to be hired.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about MGM Institute of Management and Research

likes.text: The companies came for the recruitment were ICICI Bank, Hdfc housing finance, Jeevansathi.

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.
faqs.question: Q: What is the scope of MBA?

faqs.answer: Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.
faqs.question: Q: What is the Scope of Humanities and Social Science courses?

content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good and best. There are 2 special BCA Computer Labs, including internet and Wi-Fi, with 240 computers in the lab. Hostel is not available for students. The course curriculum for BCA is updated and the latest as of 2022. But overall, the course covers basic topics.

reviews.review_heading: My College Review Akimss .
reviews.review_text:
College infrastructure is good and best. There are 2 special BCA Computer Labs, including internet and Wi-Fi, with 240 computers in the lab. 
Hostel is not available for students.  
The course curriculum for BCA is updated and the latest as of 2022. But overall, the course covers basic topics.

reviews.review_heading: Great college, amazing faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities such as clean and purified water taps, a clean garden, separate rooms dedicated to computer labs and the library, and study areas. All the labs have great connectivity, and the classrooms are also in good condition. Regarding the canteen facilities, we do not have any hostel, so I cannot comment on that.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college because of its placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi, water, a library, classrooms, etc. Our classrooms are good. The food served in the mess is good. Our college has a canteen. They provide a variety of food items.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best green campus.
reviews.review_text: The best facilities are provided by the college. The college does not have a hostel but has a canteen. Best and fresh food is available in canteen. Best medical, sports, and games facilities are provided by the college to students during their entire college life. Our college has a green campus.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and infrastructure of the college are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. You will see greenery everywhere on the campus. There are good computer labs with a decent internet connection. The library is also very good. It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus, so you can get access to free internet. There is a canteen, but there are no hostel facilities provided by the institute. You have to look for a room or a PG.

college_info.college_name: Veer Kunwar Singh University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Veer Kunwar Singh University is a public university, established in 1994 in Arrah, Bihar. Veer Kunwar Singh University is approved by NCTE and offers a total of 284 courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels in 25 specialisations such as Agriculture, Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Biotechnology, Botany and Chemistry. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc. and MCA in both Full Time and Part Time modes. Veer Kunwar Singh University fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 2,688 to 1,00,000. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Mass Communication & Media. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: A honest review of MV College Buxar.

review_content.Placements: A total 40 students could take admission in BCA in one year. Placement was not good at all here. But you will find daily classes here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Drinking water was available here on both floors. But Wi-Fi was not working properly. Classrooms were cleaned every day. But one suggestion from my side was that if anyone was capable of investing money, then they should choose other best options. But if you do not have enough money, then choose this. A playground was also available. There was nice cool environment. This college was situated at the bank of India's longest river Ganga.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My golden days and moments.

review_content.Placements: My college students get University rank holders every year. The lowest package in my college Tamil and English course, B.Sc. (IT). Top recruiting companies offered placements. OLA Private Limited offers jobs, mainly for B.Com and BCA courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are very clean and in good condition. The Chemistry lab and Physics lab are big, and students are comfortable in the labs. Classrooms are cleaned every day, and the college campus has good infrastructure. The library provides a new message to learn every day, and the canteen offers food and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A.S. College Bikramganj is a constituent college of V.K. Singh College, Arrah, Bihar.

review_content.Placements: In this college, even students who score 70%–80% in their studies. The highest score is around 50%, and the lowest is usually 30%. Students from this college also work in big companies. Around 80% of students pass.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are separate departments for all subjects. Wi-Fi is also available. There are Physics and Chemistry labs as well. This college has 40–50 classrooms, and all subjects are taught here. The college does not have its own canteen, but there are hotels outside the college where you can get good food like samosas, gulab jamun, rasmalai, and more. Here, students and the college are at the forefront when it comes to sports. Cricket, football, badminton, volleyball, and many other games are played here. The college has its own field, ground, and garden.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. (Hons.) in Geography - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good historical college with a good percentage of placements in various companies.

review_content.Placements: It is one of the most recommended colleges in the nearby area for placements. From our batch, almost 70% of students got placements in their respective jobs. The highest package is nearly 50 LPA and the lowest package is 5 LPA. The average package offered is 15 LPA, which is pretty good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Maharaja College contains lots of facilities including Wi-Fi, smart labs, decent classrooms, and a huge library. The canteen is just average but sports and games are on the top level. In infrastructure, the college needs to upgrade itself and the BCS building is too old.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college is average because of faculty, and bad placements.

review_content.Placements: This college doesn't provide any placement program for any course, and no infrastructure, so 0% placement. This college is only for certificate degrees, nothing extra is here. Still, I am saying those who are reading, seeing, and reviewing my comment here please do research once.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi is available, the library is there but not in use, the classroom is average type, and labs are only for BCA courses. Everyone is here for a certificate degree and just to be a graduate and so my opinion is very average type because those people who come here will know every situation.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Here are a few words about my college, HNCC.

review_content.Placements: Our 2024-2025 batch is very best because all students are very actively participating in all activities, and give their best for our college. Admission to our course is taken by the Maharashtra Board CET, and our course offers various kinds of job opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is quite good and worth it for our fees. The labs and classrooms are clean, but the computers present in the labs are very laggy, which is understandable. Overall, the infrastructure is very good, and each and every student can enjoy maximum.

Classrooms are cleaned every day, and the college campus has good infrastructure. The library provides a new message to learn every day, and the canteen offers food and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A.S. College Bikramganj is a constituent college of V.K. Singh College, Arrah, Bihar.

content.Placements: In this college, even students who score 70%–80% in their studies. The highest score is around 50%, and the lowest is usually 30%. Students from this college also work in big companies. Around 80% of students pass.
content.Infrastructure: There are separate departments for all subjects. Wi-Fi is also available. There are Physics and Chemistry labs as well. This college has 40–50 classrooms, and all subjects are taught here. The college does not have its own canteen, but there are hotels outside the college where you can get good food like samosas, gulab jamun, rasmalai, and more. Here, students and the college are at the forefront when it comes to sports. Cricket, football, badminton, volleyball, and many other games are played here. The college has its own field, ground, and garden.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Geography - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good historical college with a good percentage of placements in various companies.

content.Placements: It is one of the most recommended colleges in the nearby area for placements. From our batch, almost 70% of students got placements in their respective jobs. The highest package is nearly 50 LPA and the lowest package is 5 LPA. The average package offered is 15 LPA, which is pretty good.
content.Infrastructure: Maharaja College contains lots of facilities including Wi-Fi, smart labs, decent classrooms, and a huge library. The canteen is just average but sports and games are on the top level. In infrastructure, the college needs to upgrade itself and the BCS building is too old.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is average because of faculty, and bad placements.

content.Placements: This college doesn't provide any placement program for any course, and no infrastructure, so 0% placement. This college is only for certificate degrees, nothing extra is here. Still, I am saying those who are reading, seeing, and reviewing my comment here please do research once.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi is available, the library is there but not in use, the classroom is average type, and labs are only for BCA courses. Everyone is here for a certificate degree and just to be a graduate and so my opinion is very average type because those people who come here will know every situation.

admission_process.title: Veer Kunwar Singh University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Veer Kunwar Singh University admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Veer Kunwar Singh Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels. Some of the courses include B.Ed, UG Diploma, M.Lib.I.Sc. and M.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,688 - 95,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 2 years - 3 years. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 2 years.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by M.V. College, Veer Kunwar Singh UniversityReviewed on 2 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A honest review of MV College Buxar.
reviews.review_text: Drinking water was available here on both floors. But Wi-Fi was not working properly. Classrooms were cleaned every day. But one suggestion from my side was that if anyone was capable of investing money, then they should choose other best options. But if you do not have enough money, then choose this. A playground was also available. There was nice cool environment. This college was situated at the bank of India's longest river Ganga.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Unique College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 2 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My golden days and moments.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very clean and in good condition. The Chemistry lab and Physics lab are big, and students are comfortable in the labs. Classrooms are cleaned every day, and the college campus has good infrastructure. The library provides a new message to learn every day, and the canteen offers food and games.

The college does not have its own canteen, but there are hotels outside the college where you can get good food like samosas, gulab jamun, rasmalai, and more. Here, students and the college are at the forefront when it comes to sports. Cricket, football, badminton, volleyball, and many other games are played h...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Maharaja College, AraReviewed on 26 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good historical college with a good percentage of placements in various companies.
reviews.review_text: Maharaja College contains lots of facilities including Wi-Fi, smart labs, decent classrooms, and a huge library. The canteen is just average but sports and games are on the top level. In infrastructure, the college needs to upgrade itself and the BCS building is too old.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dharichhana Kunwari CollegeReviewed on 23 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is average because of faculty, and bad placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi is available, the library is there but not in use, the classroom is average type, and labs are only for BCA courses. Everyone is here for a certificate degree and just to be a graduate and so my opinion is very average type because those people who come here will know every situation.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Hirachand Nemchand College of Commerce (HNCC)
reviews.review_heading: Here are a few words about my college, HNCC.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is quite good and worth it for our fees. The labs and classrooms are clean, but the computers present in the labs are very laggy, which is understandable. Overall, the infrastructure is very good, and each and every student can enjoy maximum.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Hirachand Nemchand College of Commerce (HNCC)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best college for outcome.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is not too good, not too bad and it is average. The infrastructure of the college is quite simple but the quality of education is great so I prefer this college. This college has a library and computer lab facility which helps students for better growth.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by H.D. Jain College, Veer Kunwar Singh UniversityReviewed on 12 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of H.D. Jain College, Veer Kunwar Singh University.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility on the college campus, so students have to use their own internet or ask friends to open a hotspot. Even infrastructure and classrooms are also not good. There is no hostel facility. The library of the college is totally useless. The canteen of the college is also a waste, and students have to go outside the college campus to have a good meal.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Maharaja College, AraReviewed on 23 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: You should try it at least once in this college
reviews.review_text: Faculties were good; infrastructure was too good. Facilities that provided for our course in Zoology, such as a science lab practically in the presence of faculties and teachers, were good. No hostel facilities , canteen , mess, or food facilities were provided by the college; sports are available in our college like cricket, volleyball, football, kho-kho, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sher Shah CollegeReviewed on 6 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Overall our college is worth the money paid for the fee.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. The building and digital classrooms were very good. There was no Wi-Fi. There were no hostel facilities. We had one large library in our college. Even playground was not available. The BBA department had three classrooms on our college campus. These things were available in my college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Maharaja College, AraReviewed on 6 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: VKSU College in Ara is Good for Getting a Degree.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is better than that of other colleges in Arrah, Bihar. This is the number one college in Arrah. It also has its own playground in the area. So, if you are considering admission in Ara, you can choose this college affiliated with VKSU.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by H.D. Jain College, Veer Kunwar Singh UniversityReviewed on 27 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Overall a good collage only for degree.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average and mostly old, with very little new development. The college does have its own playground and library facilities. However, not much development has taken place, so the overall infrastructure remains average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Anjabit Singh CollegeReviewed on 6 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: This is a local area college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are normal classrooms with some computers, along with Wi-Fi and a library. The quality of the facilities in my college is minimal, and there are no mess or canteen facilities available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by H.D. Jain College, Veer Kunwar Singh UniversityReviewed on 6 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The college should be improved a lot.
reviews.review_text: There is no canteen, and the infrastructure is not so good. The classrooms are not well-organized or updated with technology, but there is a big playground, and they encourage sports a lot, with students even playing at the national level.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Hirachand Nemchand College of Commerce (HNCC)
reviews.review_heading: Opt for other colleges, I would say.
reviews.review_text:
1. The classrooms were decent I would say for our BBA batch still need a classroom like the BCA batch. We didn't have Wi-Fi. Yes, the college has the connection but we students were required to get permission for accessing it. The library is available in college, and you can access various books. Newspapers are also available. 
2. As I wasn't in college hostel, I don't know anything about the college hostel facilities. Sports and games are there; you could participate and play for your colleges ...

college_info.intro:
Rama Devi Women’s University's popular programmes are BSc and MBA. The university offers a three-year BSc programme offered at the university covers courses in the areas of Physics, Botany, Biotechnology, Chemistry, Zoology, Home Science, Computer Science, and others.
RDWU offers a two-year MBA programme under the guidance expert. Ramadevi University Bhubaneswar MBA students can seek higher education and work as Business Analysts, Finance Managers, Compliance Analysts, Market Research Analysts, Investment Bankers, and others. faqs.answer: A:    There are very few placement opportunities for B.Sc. students at Ramadevi University. There are only three or four big recruiters; the remaining companies are all local ones. Students hardly ever receive good pay packages; annual pay ranges from 1.8 to 2.4 lakhs.
faqs.question: How are Bsc placements at Ramadevi University?

faqs.answer: A:    The placement data for 2023 has not yet been made public by Ramadevi University. On the official website, however, is the release of the NIRF report 2023. 72 UG (3-year) and 58 PG (2-year) students were placed during placements in 2022, according to the report. At Rama Devi Women's University placements 2022, the median package given to UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) students was INR 2.9 LPA.
faqs.question: Does Ramadevi University have good placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Ramadevi University has not released the 2023 placement statistics yet. However, the NIRF report 2023 is released on the official website. review_summary.college_name: Rama Devi Women’s University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Education - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's the best university for M.A. in the education course.

content.Placements: Placement rates are modest here, with relatively few students obtaining a position through our college. The typical pay range is 13 LPA to 16 LPA. According to our research, the top hiring firms include Michael Page, Randstad, and Adecco. Only half of the students received internships from our college. Higher-level occupations include Educational Consultant, Supervisors, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: Our university provides good facilities and services, including well-maintained labs, classrooms, and other amenities. The university doesn't have a hostel. The facilities are adequate, but not very impressive. It offers pupils greater materials and resources. Includes a well-equipped theatre and office space.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Physics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Safe for women, good college.

content.Placements: At graduation, there are no placements. Mostly students join this course for higher studies like M.Sc. and Ph.D. After doing M.Sc. and Ph.D., students are working in colleges as central assistant professors. Most students do government jobs. Maximum number of students are now preparing for government jobs in Odisha.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. This is a women's college, no men are allowed in this college. Women feel secure in this college. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus with CCTV security. Classrooms are spacious and good. Labs are good, spacious, and have water facilities and fire connections, etc. There are two hostels inside the campus. Mess food is average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Botany - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good for higher studies with good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: There were no placements in this course. There were no internships when I was pursuing the course. As there were no placements offered, so no lowest, highest, or average packages were offered in this course. No companies came to recruit us.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on the college campus. Most of the equipment required for experiments is available in the laboratory. There is no department library for this course. Books related to this course are available in the college library. The food in the canteen is very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Psychology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Best college with the best facilities available here. Courses are the best and most affordable.

content.Placements: About 80% of students are placed in our college. The maximum salary offered was 30,000 and the minimum was 10,000. As a government college, it offers placements in government companies. Around 70% of Psychology students got internships in KIMS and different places through government programs. It is a better college with better faculty members, and the teachers are the best. The exam facilities are also better.
content.Infrastructure: College carries the best version of technology and has good facilities in the surroundings. There is a well-facilitated auditorium and air-conditioned classrooms. Computers have good technology. There is the best Wi-Fi facility in every department, good medical facilities, and good sports fields for games.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Sociology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 90% of students are placed in this course. The maximum average package offered in this course is 5.5 LPA, and the minimum is 60,000. Well, I am not aware of the top recruiting companies. A lot of students get placed in top recruiting companies. The top roles are that you can easily prepare for UPSC.
content.Infrastructure: All the labs, classrooms, and library have good facilities. All the qualities are provided in the hostel, food is available in the mess and canteen, and medical facilities, sports, and games are nice. It is better than other government colleges in town. So it is recommended.

admission_overview.college_name: Rama Devi Women’s University Admission 2025: Updates, Eligibility & Selection

admission_process.title: Rama Devi Women's University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rama Devi Women's University admission 2025 is open for all courses. The university offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Admission to all its courses is both merit and entrance-based. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exams accepted by the university, such as OJEE, Orissa SAMS and others. Further, for admission to diploma courses university offers merit-based admission. Candidates looking for admission toRama Devi Women's Universitycan apply on the official website of the university. To know more about Rama Devi Women's University admission, course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process, go through the following sections:

Rama Devi Women's University admission is ongoing for all courses. The college offers both merit and entrance-based admission to all courses. The college offers UG, and PG, courses, including BSc, MSc, BA, MA and others. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to complete the selection and eligibility criteria set by the university. Want to know other admission-related details about Rama Devi Women's University course eligibility along with selection criteria, check out the table below:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Class 12 from a recognised board
Merit-Based
Gradution from a recognised institute/university
Merit-Based
Orissa SAMS
Check here for more details aboutRama Devi Women's University courses:

Rama Devi Women's University admission process contains various steps, including registration, selection, and fee payment for final seat confirmation. Admission is open for all courses. Given below are the step-by-step details for Rama Devi Women's University admission 2025:STEP 1: Rama Devi Women's University Application Process 2025Candidates must fill out the Rama Devi Women's University admission eligibility criteria and selection criteria for all courses. After that, candidates are required to fill out the application form online on the official website of the college.STEP 2: Rama Devi Women's University Selection RoundRama Devi Women's University offers admission to candidates for all the courses based on various entrance exam scores. Additionally, candidates are required to fulfill the eligibility criteria for a particular course to be eligible for admission.STEP 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee SubmissionFor final seat allotment, the college releases the merit list on its official website. After candidates get shortlisted based on their merits, they are required to pay the admission fee to lock in their seats.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to Ramadevi University for MBA with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Ramadevi University accepts students with 60% in class 12, but I'd like to let you know that your chances of getting into Ramadevi Women's University are lower. The cutoff percentage is quite high. But since you might receive the form in the second or third round of counseling, I still suggest you fill it out.

faqs.answer: Rama Devi Women's University accepts admission based on merit and entrance exams. For the MBA programme, the university accepts national entrance exams such as OJEE. Aspiring candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the desired course. Ramadevi University Bhubaneswar course admission begins with the online application.

faqs.question: Can students join Ramadevi University directly without any entrance exam?

Candidates may print this off and bring it with them for the remaining counseling sessions.

placement_data.title: Ramadevi University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Ramadevi University has not released the 2023 placement statistics yet. However, the NIRF report 2023 is released on the official website. As per the report, 72 UG (3-year) and 58 PG (2-year) students were placed during placements 2022. The median package offered to UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) students during Rama Devi Women’s University placements 2022 stood at INR 2.9 LPA.

faqs.question: How are Bsc placements at Ramadevi University?
faqs.answer: There are very few placement opportunities for B.Sc. students at Ramadevi University. There are only three or four big recruiters; the remaining companies are all local ones. Students hardly ever receive good pay packages; annual pay ranges from 1.8 to 2.4 lakhs.

faqs.question: What is the highest package for MBA students at Rama Devi Women's University?
faqs.answer: Ramadevi University has not released the 2023 placement statistics yet. However, the NIRF report 2023 is released on the official website. As per the report, 72 UG (3-year) and 58 PG (2-year) students were placed during placements 2022. The median package offered to UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) students during Rama Devi Women’s University placements 2022 stood at INR 2.9 LPA. The highest package offered to MBA students at Rama Devi Women’s University was INR 8 lacs per annum . This figure represents the maximum salary package that a student has received from campus placements.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best university for M.A. in the education course.
reviews.review_text: Our university provides good facilities and services, including well-maintained labs, classrooms, and other amenities. The university doesn't have a hostel. The facilities are adequate, but not very impressive. It offers pupils greater materials and resources. Includes a well-equipped theatre and office space.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Shailabala Women’s CollegeReviewed on 13 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Safe for women, good college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. This is a women's college, no men are allowed in this college. Women feel secure in this college. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus with CCTV security. Classrooms are spacious and good. Labs are good, spacious, and have water facilities and fire connections, etc. There are two hostels inside the campus. Mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good for higher studies with good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on the college campus. Most of the equipment required for experiments is available in the laboratory. There is no department library for this course. Books related to this course are available in the college library. The food in the canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college with the best facilities available here. Courses are the best and most affordable.
reviews.review_text: College carries the best version of technology and has good facilities in the surroundings. There is a well-facilitated auditorium and air-conditioned classrooms. Computers have good technology. There is the best Wi-Fi facility in every department, good medical facilities, and good sports fields for games.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All the labs, classrooms, and library have good facilities. All the qualities are provided in the hostel, food is available in the mess and canteen, and medical facilities, sports, and games are nice. It is better than other government colleges in town. So it is recommended.

reviews.review_heading: Grow, shine, better, and experience.
reviews.review_text: Our college is clean and neat and provides full facilities to students. Take care of every instrument, chemical, and change and maintain them. Also, let students have better experience and knowledge. Hostel is clean and affordable and management is also friendly and sweet.

reviews.review_heading: Fests and events are organized occasionally, and scholarships are provided to meritorious students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our college include Wi-Fi connections, smart classrooms, and computer and research labs. There is a separate building for the library, which I uploaded there. The name of the library building is Kuntala Kumari Library. The facilities available in our hostel include a good room with all necessities; however, the quality of food is not good in our hostel. Medical facilities are okay. Sports and games events are conducted every year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Shailabala Women’s CollegeReviewed on 29 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Amazing faculty members, good placements in 2024, and nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice. The hostel is great with good accommodation. We have good food and plenty of space. There is a study room and clean drinking water. We have hygienic washrooms on each floor. The hostel is under surveillance 24X7 for the security of the students. Also, the students are required to be within the hostel before the time and are not allowed to go out without proper verification of the need.

reviews.review_heading: My review about my college.
reviews.review_text: There are so many facilities such as library, classrooms, and labs for our department. The quality of the hostel is good and the food they provide in canteen is good. The quality and quantity are good as per the charges. Everything is good.

reviews.review_heading: Hope and the future of many RDIANS.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the infrastructure, our college provides the best facilities and study materials for the course we pursue. We have a big and elegant chemistry lab. There are large classrooms and a huge library. The hostel, canteen, and food are good.

reviews.review_heading: This University provides various opportunities for the students to develop in all the fields.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the classes and the whole campus is just awesome. The classes are well maintained and have AC. Each block has Wi-Fi facilities. There is a separate library building with Wi-Fi, AC, and digital rooms. Sports and seminars are held all the time. The auditorium is very nice, and all programs are held there. The canteen provides fresh and good food. The hostel food is not as good, but it is edible.

reviews.review_heading: Why Ramadevi Women's University?
reviews.review_text: Inside the campus, so many facilities are available, like an open gym, playground, basketball ground, badminton court, music room, big auditorium for huge gatherings, tailor shop, canteen, groceries, hostel, NCC block, library, all particular labs for specific departments, research room, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Enjoying in the campus. Full of greenery and safe environment for girls.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Rama Devi Women's University is very good and clean. The classrooms are a good size, and some are air conditioned. They are equipped with blackboards and smart boards. The university also has a library named Kuntala Kumari Library, which has a wide range of books available.

reviews.review_heading: Rama Devi Women’s University’s review.
reviews.review_text: The campus is literally big. The infrastructure is attractive. It looks very good. Many books are available in the library and you can study there from 10 am till 5 pm. I don't think they prioritize sports and curriculum that much. As I'm not in NCC or NSS, I don't really take part in extra curricular activities.I don't live in the college hostel so I have no idea about the food quality but I know  it's affordable and cheap.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and a better place for girls students.
reviews.review_text: RD has the best hostels for women, with full security and food. It also consists of a canteen that serves hygienic food at minimal cost. It encourages various sports and encourages women in every field. It has developed smart classrooms and Wi-Fi all over the college.

review_summary.college_name: School of Business, Sushant University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Jan 2026)- Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.Hons.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My experience at the university has been positive, with a strong balance of academics.

content.Placements: In a typical B.Com program, around 70-85 percent of students get placed. The highest package generally ranges from 8-12 LPA, and the average package ranges from 4-6 LPA. The lowest package ranges from 2.5-3 LPA. Top recruiters include Deloitte, KPMG, EY, PwC, HDFC Bank, and ICICI Bank. Nearly 60-75 percent of students secure internships in firms like Deloitte, HDFC, and local financial consultancies. Top roles offered are finance associate, tax analyst, audit assistant, business development executive, and marketing analyst.
content.Infrastructure: It is good and hygienic. Sushant University boasts a Wi-Fi-enabled 14-acre campus with modern, air-conditioned classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a fully stocked library. Separate hostels for both boys and girls. Hostels offer furnished triple-sharing rooms, a dining/common area, and meal services. The campus includes a cafeteria, several canteens (with vegetarian options), and a variety of food outlets. There are extensive sports facilities, courts for basketball, tennis, volleyball, a cricket ground, and a football ground. Gym, transport shuttle, auditorium, along with basic medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Jan 2026)- Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.Hons.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: Sales, Finance, Operations. 99 percent of placement given to the student. 98 percent student got internship in Agile Capital, Travel Plus, Fab Hotels, Wipro, Rail Your Pick. The highest placement is 10-15 LPA. They provide summer internship and social internship.
content.Infrastructure: It is very good, hygienic food, Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are very good. All the classrooms are smart classes. Library has many effective books. Canteen is very hygienic. Hostel rooms are very good and clean. Hostel is very clean and mess also clean.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) (Hons.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Students can have a great life on campus and will have a good balance between studies and fun.

content.Placements: Placements were neither good nor bad because six out of ten students were placed on campus. The existing colleges and universities don't have this ratio. The average placement was about 3.4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is good. It has a football field, two basketball courts, two volleyball courts, and two long tennis courts. All the classrooms and the library are provided with air conditioning, whiteboards, and projectors for presentations. The university even has an auditorium to host or organise events and guest lectures. Students carrying their laptops can use the Wi-Fi facility by getting the password from the IT department. The books from the library can be issued for 14 days and can be re-issued after that. Students can issue sports equipment to play at university timings with ID cards.

admission_overview.title: School of Business, Sushant University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: School of Business, Sushant University Admission 2026 is open for all courses. The school offers over 10 courses at UG, PG and PhD levels. These courses cover the domains of Science, Management and Business.The application process at School of Business, Sushant University is conducted both in online mode and offline mode. The admission process is merit based for some courses and entrance based for others. The admission process includes Personal Interview rounds after release of merit list. UG courses have a duration of three to four years while PG courses extend upto 2 years. PhD courses have a minimum duration of 3 years and may extend over. The course fee for BBA / BBA (Hons) is INR 8.62 Lakh including the security deposit and admission fee both of which are one time payments. Read on to know more details about School of Business, Sushant University Admission 2026.

admission_process.title: School of Business, Sushant University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: School of Business, Sushant University Admission 2026is a mix of both merit based and entrance based admissions. The admission process at the college includes Application, Entrance exam, release of merit list , Personal Interview and offer of Selection Letter. Find below a step-wise explanation of theSchool of Business, Sushant University Admission Process:
lists: Application: Apply online on the official website of the university or apply offline at the the admissions office, SOB, Sushant University.
Screening Round: Check the minimum eligibility and appear for the required entrance examination - Business Aptitude test
Merit list Release: University releases the merit list of selected students, course wise.
PI Round: Selected students will be invited for personal interview round.
Selection Letter:Students who clear the PI round will be offered the Selection letter.
Admission Confirmation:Pay the non-refundable, one time admission fee to secure the seat offered by the university.

placement_data.title: School of Business, Sushant University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The School of Business, Sushant University has a Placement Cell that provides 100% placement assistance to all of its students. The cell organizes the campus recruitment training process to train the students through various training sessions including Aptitude test, Technical test, Group Discussions (GD), Mock interviews, etc. Students are put through a series of workshops, guest lectures, seminars and other exercises to become ready to meet the ever changing corporate challenges.

The School has released the details of the salaries offered to MBA, BBA and BCom batch passed out in 2025. The highest and average package secured by the MBA batch 2025 stood at INR 14.10 LPA nd INR 7.30 LPA . Some of the top job roles offered to the batch 2025 include Product Manager, Financial Analyst, Sales Manage, Brand Manager, etc. The top recruiters of School of Business, Sushant University in 2025 include Wipro, KPMG, Deloitte, Nestle, Airtel, ITC, etc.

hostel_campus.college_name: School of Business

hostel.description: Sushant University provides hostels on triple sharing basis which can accommodate 300 students. The hostels provides the facilities like house keeping, common/dinning room with TV, newspapers & magazines, outdoors games facilities like Basket Ball, Football, Cricket, volleyball.
facilities: LPU ke MBA aur engineering programs mein dual specialization option hai.
Curriculum industry-oriented hai, aur faculty members ke paas real-world experience hai.
Business School ka accreditation ACBSP (USA) se hai, jo global recognition deta hai.

library.description: Sushant University library has three sections including a main section and has two auxiliary sections where 200 students can be accommodated. It has the collection of approx. 45,000 books and CDs on Architecture, Applied Science, Biotechnology, Computer Science, Design, Engineering, Education, Humanities, Hotel Management, Management, Literature, Law and Liberal Arts, etc. It also has a vast collection of reference books; handbooks, dictionaries and encyclopedia. The Library is fully automated and computerized by LS Ease software. The library has also subscribed to the online Journals and database like IEEE, EBSCO host, JSTOR, MANUPATRA and also member of DELNET.
