reviews.review_heading: My experience at the university has been positive, with a strong balance of academics.
reviews.review_text: It is good and hygienic. Sushant University boasts a Wi-Fi-enabled 14-acre campus with modern, air-conditioned classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a fully stocked library. Separate hostels for both boys and girls. Hostels offer furnished triple-sharing rooms, a dining/common area, and meal services. The campus includes a cafeteria, several canteens (with vegetarian options), and a variety of food outlets. There are extensive sports facilities, courts for basketball, tennis, volleyball, a cricket...

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: It is very good, hygienic food, Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms are very good. All the classrooms are smart classes. Library has many effective books. Canteen is very hygienic. Hostel rooms are very good and clean. Hostel is very clean and mess also clean.

reviews.review_heading: College is good. Would recommend others to take college.
reviews.review_text: All is good with neat and clean. The library is good. Classrooms are good. Canteen food is amazing. Labs are also good at maintaining a good environment. The facilities provided are good, and the infrastructure is also good. Would definitely recommend others to take admission.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the placements. But the infrastructure and facilities were good.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the faculty was top notch, no doubt, they were highly educated. Most of them were experts in their subjects. Wi-Fi was not there in the campus, other than that, AC, labs, classrooms, and playground were all good. The campus is good and the building is kept clean.

reviews.review_heading: Students can have a great life on campus and will have a good balance between studies and fun.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is good. It has a football field, two basketball courts, two volleyball courts, and two long tennis courts. All the classrooms and the library are provided with air conditioning, whiteboards, and projectors for presentations. The university even has an auditorium to host or organise events and guest lectures. Students carrying their laptops can use the Wi-Fi facility by getting the password from the IT department. The books from the library can be issued for ...

reviews.review_heading: Only architecture and design are good in the college and other course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure depends on the course you choose if we see infrastructure departments it is very well built whereas the pharmacy department is not well built. There is a small playing area for different sports and not much big library for other courses rather than architecture.

reviews.review_heading: Sushant University has good and helpful faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. The classrooms are not that great. The quality of the hostel and mess is good. The food is good. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are good, and we enjoy a lot and play there.

reviews.review_heading: Sushant University provides a cheerful and a happening environment.
reviews.review_text: Smartboards are available in all the classrooms of our college. The food served in the canteen is super hygienic and very tasty. The library has a great peaceful environment. Classrooms are very comfortable to study in. The hostel has a lot of fun activities that help the students to relax their minds.

reviews.review_heading: Review of School of Business, Sushant University.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is average but not that good. There are 4-5 canteens, but they do not open them properly. The service is very bad as they have limited staff members. The whole university cannot be attended by some limited staff members.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with average placements, good infrastructure, and best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure, and it always focuses on improving infrastructure. They currently have a good sports area, and hostel area which is one of the best parts of their infrastructure. There is a total of three canteens, the main canteen gives average, and the other give good quality of food.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of faculty members and other facilities provided by our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our campus is good, and there is one central library in the reception building. Many schools have a library in their own building. Sushant School of Business has an auditorium where many events, workshops and guest lectures are organised. Hostels are kind of strict as there are restrictions like students should not enter into the hostel after 8 pm or 9 pm.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good on our campus as there are digital classrooms with air-conditioners. Other facilities are also good like a sports complex, the quality of hostel, etc. The food served in the hostel is good, and medical facilities are also good as there is a medical room with equipment. For emergency, our college has its own ambulance.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is phenomenal, and the facilities provided are all up to date. Besides that, we have access to all sorts of equipment. They could add a swimming pool to attract more people and extend the collaboration with Warwick University, which would be helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Review of business school, Ansal university .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good there is availability of Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library as well as hostel is also there for the ones who want to stay in hostel. And for hostels there is mess and canteen in the college. Sports and games facilities is there.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sushant School of Business, Ansal University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is fine, and there is a Wi-Fi facility. Our college provides centrally air-conditioned classrooms and labs. The library is also available. The hostel is good, and proper food is served in the mess. Sports and games facilities are available.

college_info.college_name: Pailan College of Management and Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Infrastructure

highlights.summary:
WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at Pailan College of Management and Technology are BTech and MBA. The college offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the college offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum. PCMT Kolkata courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Pailam College of Management and Technology in the table provided below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Pailan College of Management and Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Management, Computer Applications, Science, etc. At the UG level, the college offers various courses such as BTech, BOPTM, BBA, BCA, BSc, and BHMTT. These courses are generally offered to students for a duration of 3 years.

faqs.answer: A:    In order to study BSc at Pailan College of Management and Technology, students must have successfully completed their Class 12 classes. Those selected will be those with valid scores from CBSE or WBCHSE. Academic performance is checked by the college to choose individuals for consideration. Only people who are qualified can apply.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BSc at Pailan College of Management and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT is up to 538. Good thing to know is that Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent faculty and strong placements for BBA students.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides excellent placement opportunities for BBA students. Around 80%-90% of students from our batch got successfully placed in reputed companies. Top recruiting companies like Wipro, Infosys, TCS, and HDFC Bank. Students are offered roles like HR and marketing.
review_content.Infrastructure: I do not stay in a hostel, but students have mentioned that the hostel facilities are good, with proper food quality and hygiene maintained in the mess. It provides free Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, clean classrooms, and air-conditioned libraries.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with faculty, courses, facilities, and connectivity. However, events are uncommon.

review_content.Placements: About 40% of them are placed, the rest went on to find their own jobs owing to the skill sets they developed. The highest package offered is 4.5– 4.8 LPA. Recruiting companies are Techno Exponent, TCS, Globsyn, etc. Some of the major roles offered are data analyst, data entry officer, UI/UX designer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Multiple working Wi-Fi channels are available around the institute. Labs are well-maintained with capable machines. Classrooms are decently big, although some of them lack air-conditioning or have poorly maintained ACs. The library has a commendable collection of books; however, requisitions for any required book are entertained.

faqs.answer: Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering/Technology from a recognised college with a minimum of 45% marks (40% marks for SC/ST/OBC-A/OBC-B/PWD) or equivalent CGPA Or Candidate must have completed B.Sc. from a recognised college with a minimum of 45% marks (40% marks for SC/ST/OBC-A/OBC-B/PWD) or equivalent CGPA. For B.Sc candidate the upper age limit is 27 years as on 31.12.2017 (There is no upper age limit for Diploma holders in Engineering/Technology).BBACandidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognied baord.BCACandidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognied baord.B.Sc.Candidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognied baord.BHMCandidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognied baord.BOPTMCandidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognied baord.BHMTTCandidate must have completed 10+2 from a recognied baord.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have comepleted Minimum Bachelor Degree with (10+2+3) or (10+2+4) in any discipline from any University recognised by AICTE or UGC. Final year undergraduate students can also apply.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get into Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: The application deadline at Pailan College of Management and Technology is always found on their official website. People usually enroll in UG courses between the months of June and July. Look at the official website often to get new updates. Applications made after the deadline might not be admitted.
faqs.question: Q: What is the last date for Pailan College of Management and Technology admission 2025?

faqs.answer: Admission to BBA and BCA at Pailan College of Management and Technology is given depending on merit. You do not have to take an entrance exam for these courses as long as you are qualified. You must have MAT or WBJEE mark to apply for MBA and BTech. You cannot receive direct admission for these programmes.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get admission at Pailan College of Management and Technology without an entrance exam?

overview_faqs.answer: Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT is a reputed institute for B.Tech, BBA, BCA, B.Sc., BHM, BOPTM, BHMTT, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Mass Communication & Media, Hospitality & Travel, Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT has a rating of 3.2 on the basis of reviews by students. review_summary.college_name: Pailan College of Management and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Excellent campus and great support.

content.Placements: I am a second-year BBA student. Our college has an IIC and TPO cell. They help and guide us for a cracking interview. I have asked my seniors, and they have said that they have got internships. Students receive excellent opportunities to connect with reputed companies, secure internships, and achieve strong job offers that set the foundation for bright and successful careers.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has clean classrooms, good Wi-Fi, computer labs, a library filled with valuable books and resources, an infirmary, sports, etc. The entire infrastructure is designed to create a positive learning and living environment for students. The hostel is well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: All in all, it is a very good college to join with a very big campus and facilities.

content.Placements: Our college has a TPO and IIC cell, which provides us with several types of placements and internships for all of the students. I asked my seniors about the placements, and they responded very positively that various companies have come to our college to take students for their company.
content.Infrastructure: I personally do not stay in hostels, but many of my friends stay in hostels, and they say it is very comfortable. Also, the infrastructure is very homely as there are ACs in classrooms, Wi-fi available, and we have two to three libraries with various books for students.

content.Placements: Placements at our college are satisfactory, and reputed companies visit the college each year. Many students secure jobs in the core and IT sectors. The training and support provided are helpful, though opportunities vary by branch. We are trained to face interviews.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has clean classrooms, common rooms for students to relax, and hygienic washrooms. Sports competitions happen every year. There is a huge library and a computer lab with high-speed internet. There are AC classrooms with whiteboards. The food quality could be improved a bit. Four groups are divided into sports.

admission_overview.title: Pailan College of Management and Technology Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Pailan College of Management and Technology admission to all its courses is entrance-based. The institute offers UG courses in the stream of Technology and Management, which are offered in affiliation with the Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology. These are BBA (General), BBA in Business Analytics and BCA. Pailan College of Management and Technology - PCMT is affiliated to Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology MAKAUT accepts state-level and national-level entrance exams to shortlist candidates for final admission. Those who qualify for the entrance examination can then register on the Pailan College of Management and Technology registration portal for seat allocation. Pailan College of Management and Technology offers UG courses in the disciplines of Technology and Management. Admission to all these courses at Pailan College of Management and Technology is done through a Common Entrance Test, i.e., MAKAUT CET. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. Check out the table below for admission highlights of Pailan College of Management and Technology:

eligibility_selection.title: Pailan College of Management and Technology Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Pailan College of Management and Technology offers entrance-based admission to all its courses. Admission to BBA and BCA courses is open and is based on merit. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course will have to appear for the entrance exam for admission to the BCA and BBA courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for Pailan College of Management and Technology courses :

admission_process.title: Pailan College of Management and Technology  Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Pailan College of Management and Technology conducts various rounds to shortlist candidates for MBA & BTech courses. Admission to Pailan College of Management and Technology is a multi-step process. Check below the step-wise Pailan College of Management and Technology admission process:
Step 1: Pailan College of Management and Technology Application Process 2025

To get the application login credentials, candidates will have to submit the registration fee through the official website of Pailan College of Management and Technology. Candidates need to apply online on the official website of the university.
Step 2: Pailan College of Management and Technology Selection Process 2025

Admission to BBA & BCA courses is entrance-based. The institute has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. Pailan College of Management and Technology accepts a valid score of MAT, JEMAT, CAT, WBJEE and WBJEE, which is conducted at an all-India level examination. The selection process includes an entrance exam, shortlisting of candidates & final admission.
Step 3: Pailan College of Management and Technology Counselling & Admission Confirmation

After completion of the selection rounds, candidates need to come for counselling and document verification. Selected candidates need to pay aPailan College of Management and Technology course feeto confirm their admission.

faqs.question: What BTech specialisations are offered at Pailan College of Management and Technology?
faqs.answer: At Pailan College of Management and Technology, students can get a B.Tech degree in Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science and Electronics & Communication.The courses run for three to four years when students are present full-time at the college.In chosen fields, students get both practical skills and an understanding of theory.MAKAUT is the authority that approves the curriculum.

faqs.question: How is admission granted for BTech course at Pailan College of Management and Technology?
faqs.answer: BTech admission at Pailan College of Management and Technology is offered based on your merit.The academic record or scores from important entrance exams such as WBJEE and JEE Main, help to evaluate students.Those who are qualified can access the online platform for application.Before final admission, a student must undergo counselling and show their essential documents.

faqs.question: What is the duration of BTech at Pailan College of Management and Technology?
faqs.answer: It takes between 3 and 4 years to complete the B.Tech programme at Pailan College of Management and Technology.How long it takes depends on the student's initial academic background and how the programme is completed.The curriculum offers lessons in class, lab practice and involves doing projects.It trains students for positions in different engineering fields.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Pailan College of Management and Technology?
faqs.answer: Direct admission is not provided by Pailan College of Management and Technology for any course.Students are admitted to courses after tests or based on their marks depending on the course.Anyone interested in the programme must check if they are eligible and go through the selection process.You should also expect to have counseling and verification of your documents.

faqs.question: Does Pailan College of Management and Technology accept admission through MAT?
faqs.answer: It is possible to use MAT scores as part of your application for MBA at Pailan College of Management and Technology.To be eligible, people must have graduated with at least 50% and appear in either the MAT or the JEMAT test.Those who have been shortlisted are required to attend counselling and verify their seats.The number of available seats is not large which is why you should apply early.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Pailan College of Management and Technology without an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Admission to BBA and BCA at Pailan College of Management and Technology is given depending on merit.You do not have to take an entrance exam for these courses as long as you are qualified.You must have MAT or WBJEE mark to apply for MBA and BTech.You cannot receive direct admission for these programmes.

hostel.description: The college hostel rooms are comfortable and furnished with cots, chairs, tables, cupboards for individuals with hygienic toilet facilities. Healthy and the tastier food is served in the hostel. Facilities such as recreational hall, indoor and outdoor games, gym, uninterrupted power supply with generator facility etc are available in the hostel.

library.description: The college has a well-equipped library with a huge collection of around 15926 books, journals, e-journals etc. Institutional Membership with American Library Association, British Council, and Delnet. Digital library and book bank facilities are also available in the library. Engineering library has a total number of 13,652 books.

The college has a well-equipped library with a huge collection of around 15926 books, journals, e-journals etc. Institutional Membership with American Library Association, British Council, and Delnet. Digital library and book bank facilities are also available in the library. Engineering library has a total number of 13,652 books.

hostel.description: The college hostel rooms are comfortable and furnished with cots, chairs, tables, cupboards for individuals with hygienic toilet facilities. Healthy and the tastier food is served in the hostel. Facilities such as recreational hall, indoor and outdoor games, gym, uninterrupted power supply with generator facility etc are available in the hostel.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Physics Lab, Analog & Digital Electronics Lab, Basic Electrical & Electronic Engg Lab, Control System Lab, Database Management System Lab, Digital Communication Lab, Object Oriented Programming Lab, Electrical Drives Lab, Electrical Machine Design Lab, Engineering Graphics /Drawing Lab, Microprocessor & Microcontroller Lab, Power Electronics Lab, Multimedia Lab, Embedded Lab, Transducer & Sensor Lab, Analog Electronic Circuit Lab, Strength of Materials Lab, Soil Mechanics Lab, Fluid Mechanics Lab, Analog Communication Lab, Data Structure Lab

reviews.review_heading: Excellent campus and great support.
reviews.review_text: The campus has clean classrooms, good Wi-Fi, computer labs, a library filled with valuable books and resources, an infirmary, sports, etc. The entire infrastructure is designed to create a positive learning and living environment for students. The hostel is well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: All in all, it is a very good college to join with a very big campus and facilities.
reviews.review_text: I personally do not stay in hostels, but many of my friends stay in hostels, and they say it is very comfortable. Also, the infrastructure is very homely as there are ACs in classrooms, Wi-fi available, and we have two to three libraries with various books for students.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty and strong placements for BBA students.
reviews.review_text: I do not stay in a hostel, but students have mentioned that the hostel facilities are good, with proper food quality and hygiene maintained in the mess. It provides free Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, clean classrooms, and air-conditioned libraries.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, courses, facilities, and connectivity. However, events are uncommon.
reviews.review_text: Multiple working Wi-Fi channels are available around the institute. Labs are well-maintained with capable machines. Classrooms are decently big, although some of them lack air-conditioning or have poorly maintained ACs. The library has a commendable collection of books; however, requisitions for any required book are entertained.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has clean classrooms, common rooms for students to relax, and hygienic washrooms. Sports competitions happen every year. There is a huge library and a computer lab with high-speed internet. There are AC classrooms with whiteboards. The food quality could be improved a bit. Four groups are divided into sports.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and campus life is excellent.
reviews.review_text: The course infrastructure is decent. We have good labs and classrooms with AC. But the toilets are dirty of the college. Hostel facilities are average, with satisfactory food in the mess. Hostel has gym and playground for playing football and cricket. We have study room and recreation room.

reviews.review_heading: PCMT College has strong academics with growing infrastructure and industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: A large central library plus 2-3 division libraries. Well-equipped laboratories, including computer labs & a full Wi-Fi campus. Separate boys' and girls' hostels are available with comfortable rooms including a chair, table, and bed. The food quality is decent, and this college has good medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with our course.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent lab facilities, a good library, an enabled campus, and a good sports ground. No canteen facilities are available right now, but they may open soon. Hostel facilities are also available for outstation students at a very minimal cost. Overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Strong clinical exposure, supportive faculty & vibrant campus life, but Scope for better equipment.
reviews.review_text: Faculty are good, helpful, understanding, and of average qualified. They can make future optometrists well-educated. Semesters are not too hard if we study well. 70% students pass the exam in each semester, but some students are not able to pass.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, good at average levels.
reviews.review_text: It has average college interior, not to much attractive but looks overall good. Wi-Fi is also available but poor connection level. Labs are clean and quite good. Classrooms are good but AC is not working well. There is a library but books are too poor condition and lack of books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: College is good in average condition.
reviews.review_text: It has average college interior, not to much attractive but looks overall good. Wi-Fi is also available but poor connection level. Labs are clean and quite good. Classrooms are good but AC is not working well. There is a library but books are too poor condition and lack of books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the experience is good.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 computer labs with 20 & 30 desktops, and CCTV surveillance in entrances & classrooms also where students give exams. Few of my friends are staying in a hostel, & they said the rooms are good, & the food of the canteen is average as compared to price.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but the hostel facility is not good enough .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but the hostel is not. The hostel is moderate. There is no mess for food; you should go to the market and buy some food for yourself. The college provides medical facilities and has its own ambulance. The principal of the college also provides inspiration for sports and cultural functions.

reviews.review_heading: Navigating Mediocrity: A candid review of Pailan college of management and technology.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms have AC and the whole campus has free Wi-Fi. But the buildings have been under development for a long time. PCMT is not very big, like other colleges in West Bengal, with the same fee. There is better infrastructure at other colleges at the same price.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is not bad, it is an average college in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: Better infrastructure , like free Wi-Fi, AC Classrooms, free library and each day you can take your subject related book from our library . Very co - operative teachers are here for library. Hostel facility, mess and canteen is also good. There are different hostel present for boys and girls.

reviews_list.review_title: Amazing experience at MET AMDC so far.

review_content.Placements: Currently, my batch and I are looking for summer internship opportunities in companies and the college placement cell are on it day and night to get us the best companies for holistic development. Few companies offering summer internship to us include HDFC Ltd. , Praedico Global Research Pvt. Ltd. , Mondelez, Aditya Birla Capital, Britannia Industries, ABC Chemicals and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college does not have hostel facility but it provides its students with state of the art infrastructure and all amenities, including elevator facility, readily available. Following are some of the amenities that I enjoy the most - 1. The library that the institute possesses is one of the largest in Mumbai with a variety of book ranging from management to ethics to self improvement to many more. 2. The canteen, the hub of students, offer food which is tasty and affordable. 3. There is also indoor game facility and MET World of Music available for students to relax and rejuvenate.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Programme in Management and Business Administration (Business Analytics) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Above average experience with respect to online learning.

review_content.Placements: The management promises over 90% placement rate. The average package offered stands at approximately. 6 lacs per annum. Companies visiting for current year include Deloitte Tax, Decimal Point Analytics, Morningstar. Roles offered are Taxation, Credit Rating till now.
review_content.Infrastructure: Due to covid-19 unfortunately, I was not able to take benefit of the facilities of the college. Still, there is a good Wi-Fi, labs and a well-equipped library in the campus. The facilities are good and the college is very well located. Heard there are several sport activities done too.

college_info.college_name: MET Asian Management Development Centre Fees 2026

fees_overview.description: Candidates can enroll for any of the MET Asian Management Development Centre courses by paying the course fee. The fee for the available courses is INR 8,75,000. The MET Asian Management Development Centre fee is made up of a number of different elements, including the tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee. There are two types of MET Asian Management Development Centre fee components: refundable and non-refundable. To confirm their seat, candidates who made through the shortlist via the MET Asian Management Development Centre admission process must pay the course fee.

course_details.course_description: At MET Asian Management Development Centre, students can pursue MBA/PGDM at PG level. MET Asian Management Development Centre MBA/PGDM is offered in a full time mode. As per the MET Asian Management Development Centre fee structure, the institute charges several components, such as hostel deposit, s

The above-mentioned fee includes 18% GST

course_faqs.question: Can I pay MET AMDC PGPMBA fee in installments?
course_faqs.answer: MET Asian Management Development Centre accept PGPMBA fee payment in installments. However, for this facility, candidates should have a written permission of the management. The admission office can be contacted as well.

overview_faqs.question: What is PGP EMBA course at MET AMDC?
overview_faqs.answer: MET AMDC offers a two-year course of Post Graduate Programme in Empowered Management & Business Administration (PGP EMBA). It is a flagship course of MET AMDC. This course is offered across three specialisations namely, Marketing, Finance and Human Resources along with four certifications.

overview_faqs.question: What is Empowered MBA at the MET Asian Management Development Centre?
overview_faqs.answer: MET Asian Management Development Centre offers Post Graduate Programme in Empowered Management & Business Administration (PGP EMBA) which is an autonomous two-year flagship programme at MET AMDC. The course is spread across four certificates and offers specialisations in Finance, Marketing, and Human Resources. The total fee for this course is INR 8.75 Lacs and the accepted entrance exams are MAT, CAT, XAT, GMAT, CMAT, ATMA, MAH CET, and others.

overview_faqs.question: Does MET Asian Management Development Centre has collaborations with any college or university?
overview_faqs.answer: MET Asian Management Development Centre has collaborated with various organisations, colleges and universities. MET has signed MoUs with various colleges and universities. Some of the MET collaborations are the Association of Chartered Certified Accountants (ACCA), UK, NCC Education, UK, Manhattan Institute of Management, New York, EAE Business School, Spain, Business & Hotel Management School, Switzerland, SetCONNECT, USA, ICE Creative Excellence Pvt. Ltd. (Founded by Balaji Telefilms Ltd.), TCS iON, and others.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for MET AMDC?
overview_faqs.answer: MET AMDC applications are conducted in online mode. Candidates filling the application form must also pay an application fee to submit their form. The application fee for PG courses at MET AMDC is INR 1,500.

review_summary.college_name: MET Asian Management Development Centre Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Programme in Management and Business Administration (Business Analytics) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: MET provides innovative learning experiences.

content.Placements: Most of the students get placed with an average salary package of 4 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies that come to campus are HDFC, ICICI, Publicize, etc. Around 95% of the students get internships. The roles offered are "deputy managers," "sales executives," and so on.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is great and spacious. Wi-Fi is provided. Laptops are also given by the college. Every classroom and library has air-conditioner units installed. The canteen is clean and hygienic. The recreational centre provides overall development.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Programme in Management and Business Administration (Business Analytics) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am happy that I took admission here.

content.Placements: 98% of students got placed. 11 LPA is the highest package offered. Morgan Stanley, EY, Deloitte, etc., came here. 96% of students got internships in Mondelez, HDFC, Aditya Birla, Saint Gobain, Welspun, Parag Milk Foods Ltd., Britannia etc. My college experience has been great. We get to learn something new every day. The staff and professors are ever ready to help us. Our subjects are well designed, keeping up with the industry.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are very well maintained with AC, projectors, speakers and Wi-Fi connection. The classrooms are kept clean. We have our own lockers and a common room to relax. Food is tasty and hygienic in the canteen. The games room is our favorite, where we play table tennis, carrom and chess. We also have a music room where we can have karaoke and listen to music or play any instrument of our choice.

admission_overview.college_name: MET Asian Management Development Centre Course Admissions 2026: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: MET AMDC Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: MET AMDC admission is completely entrance-based. The institute conducts its entrance exam called the MET Management Congruence Test (MET-MCT) for admission to management courses. Apart from MET-MCT, MET AMDC also accepts various national-level entrance exams and they are CAT/ CMAT/ MH-CET/ XAT/ ATMA/ GMAT/ NMAT/ MAT. Candidates with a bachelor's degree in any discipline from a recognised university are eligible to apply for the MET AMDC courses. Applications are accepted strictly in the online mode through teh official MET AMDC website. MET Asian Management Development Centre offers three PGP courses and they are as under: Read the article to know more about MET AMDC admission 2026.

eligibility_selection.title: MET AMDC Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: MET AMDC admissions 2026 are ongoing. Candidates seeking admission to MET AMDC courses are required to meet the eligibility criteria and then apply to the programme through the MET official website. The table below shows the MET AMDC course eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: Bachelor's degree in any discipline with a minimum 50% marks from a recognised university. Proficiency in MS Office. Note: Those who are appearing for the final year exams are also eligible to apply. Provided that they produce the degree or mark sheet on or before the due date.
courses_table.selection_criteria: MET-MCT/ MAT/ CAT/ XAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/ MAH CET/ NMAT + Aptitude Questions and Statement of Purpose – SOP (Recorded on a single 3 min long Video) + Online PI (if required)+ Academic performance+ Other Parameters

faqs.answer: The minimum eligibility requirement for PGPMBA at MET AMDC is having a UG degree in any discipline with a minimum 50% marks from a recognised university and proficiency in MS Office.Note: Those who are appearing for the final year exams are also eligible to apply. Provided that they produce the degree or mark sheet on or before the due date.
faqs.question: What is the minimum eligibility requiremet for PGPMBA at MET AMDC?

faqs.answer: MET AMDC accepts MET-MCT/ MAT/ CAT/ XAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/ MAH CET/ NMAT scores for admission into the offered programmes. Students who have not appeared in the above examinations must appear for the in house entrance test, MET Management Congruence Test (MET-MCT). The selection process considers the scores of the above exams along with aptitude questions, SOP  (Recorded on a single 3 min long Video), Online PI (if required) and Academic performance.
faqs.question: What are the examinations accepted for admission at MET AMDC?

faqs.answer: MET AMDC offer entrance-based admission to its PGPMBA programmes. Candidates need a valid score of MET - MCT or other national level exams. After selection based on exam score, the candidated are called for group discussion and personal interview round.
faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in PGPMBA at MET Asian Management Development Centre?

faqs.answer: The institute require educational and identity proofs during admission. These documents help in verifying candidate details. Some of the documents to be kept handy during MET ASDM PGPMBA admissions are:Class 10 and 12 marksheetGraduation certificateAadhaar card or other identity proofCharacter certificate, etc.
faqs.question: Which documents are required for PGPMBA admission in MET Asian Management Development Centre?

admission_process.title: MET AMDC Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: MET AMDC course admission processis a three-step process and the steps includeapplication, shortlisting and admission confirmation. The MET AMDC offers PGPMBA courses and admission criteria for all of them are completely entrance-based. Interested candidates are required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria before applying. The step-wiseMET AMDC Admission processis explained below:
Step 1: MET AMDC Application Process

The MET AMDC application process is conducted online on the official website. Candidates need to register using a valid email ID and mobile no. followed by filling out the application form with all the required information and paying of application fees. Candidates must check the eligibility criteria of their desired PGPMBA course, before applying.
Step 2: MET AMDC Selection Process

MET AMDC shortlists candidates based on their performance in the entrance exam. The institute conducts its entrance exam called MET-MCT. Apart from the aforementioned in-house entrance exams, the institute accepts various national-level entrance exams.
Further, the selection criteria of MET AMDC also include the following basis:
Step 3: Final Admission

Selected candidates will be notified via email or text message. Candidates who wish to secure a seat are required to pay the admission confirmation fee. Applicants are advised to keep checking their inbox for any updates.
lists: Aptitude Questions and Statement of Purpose – SOP(Recorded on a single 3 min long Video)/Online interview (if required)

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA - Northeastern State University (NSU) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Amazing experience in NSU, faculty, friends, infrastructure, campus activities were the best.

review_content.Placements: The placements were really good, many of our seniors and myself got into the domain on the major we pursued in Masters. About 75% of the students got placed after the graduation. As per the US rules, the Master's graduates get more than $60,000 depending on the designation as well. The companies which visited are Walmart, Dell, T-mobiles, Albert, Bank of America and many insurance and financial services companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are really good, that too for an international student. The campus is very friendly. The dorms are really good and have many blocks, depending on where you are comfortable to stay. The campus is always safe as the university has campus police who have surveillance 24/7. Regarding the food, it is in the American cuisine, and have various locations to eat around. The students in the campus are very friendly and helpful all the time.

highlights.summary:
The COMEDK UGET 2026 registration last date for East West Group Of Institutions, Magadi Road admission to the BE/BTech programme has been extended till Mar 20, 2026. Also, the COMEDK UGET exam 2026 will be held on May 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
East West Group of Institutions, Magadi Road offers BTech and MBA as its flagship courses. BTech is offered through the East West Institute of Technology and East West College of Technology. BTech and MTech specialisations include Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics and Communication, and Information Science. It is offered for the duration of 4 years in full-time mode.
On the hand hand, MBA is offered through the East West College of Management and East West School of Business Management. It is offered for the duration of 2 years. The course is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE). Candidates can take a look below at the East West Group of Institutions, Magadi Road popular courses:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with placements.

review_content.Placements: In our college, around 60% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies like SLX, Amazon, etc., visit our campus. Students with a CGPA of around 7-10 are easily getting internships. The top role offered is an associate trainee.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Labs are well-maintained. Digital classrooms are available. Projectors are available in classrooms. Classrooms are under CCTV surveillance.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the placements and the infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: A maximum number of students are placed from our course, the maximum package is about 10 LPA and the average package is about 4 LPA, and the top recruiting companies for our course are Wipro, Infosys, etc. About 70 to 80 percent of students got internships from our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are well and good in our course, they provide Wi-Fi, labs, a library, spacious classrooms, and smart classes. There are good sports facilities, canteens, and mess, the food is okay and there is a medical facility available at any time during college hours, the quality of hostel facilities is good.

faqs.answer: East West Group Of Institutions, Magadi Road provides programmes including M.Pharma, BBA, B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma, Pharm.D, BCA, D.Pharma, B.Com, BVA, M.Com, B.Sc, B.A, M.Sc, After 10th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Engineering, Accounting & Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Science, Mass Communication & Media, Humanities & Social Sciences, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Computer Science Engineering, Aeronautical Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mathematics, Computer Science, Statistics, Physics, Electronics, Chemistry, Genetics, Biotechnology, Botany, Microbiology, Biochemistry, Criminology, Forensic Science, Electrical Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses does East West Group Of Institutions, Magadi Road offer?

faqs.answer: East West Group Of Institutions, Magadi Road has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.PharmaCandidate must be graduate in relevant stream from recognised university are eligible to apply.BBACandidate must have passed in PDC/ PU / 10+2 or equivalent course with any combination from any recognised Board.D.PharmaCandidate must have passed 10+2 from recognised board are eligible to apply.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed in 2nd PUC / 12th Std / Equivalent Exam with English as one of the Languages and obtained in aggregate in Physics and Mathematics along with Chemistry / Bio-Technology / Biology / Electronics / Computer with the mentioned marks in aggregate from a recognised Institute/ University.B.PharmaCandidates completed Diploma in Pharmacy and secured minimum of 45% marks (40% for SC, ST, OBC, Cat-1, 2A, 2B, 3A and 3B category candidates) from an institution approved by PCI are also eligibile to apply.Pharm.DCandidate should have completed the age of Seventeen Years as on 31st December of 2023.M.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed qualifying examination or equivalent examination as prescribed by the Competent Authority and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I candidates) taken together in all the subjects of all the years/ semesters of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university. Final year students can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates must have valid GATE score.BCACandidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent examination from a recognised school/board.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed Grade 10, SSLC or its equivalent with a minimum of 35% marks from a recognised board/institute.

It's quite impressive compared to other colleges; there is another branch in Yelahanka.
content.Infrastructure: I am pursuing a computer science engineering course that is good, and the faculty members are good and friendly. The infrastructure of the college is amazing; it has 6 floors, each floor for each department. On the last floor, there is the MCA Boys Hostel, which has good food quality and average-sized rooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My Engineering Story at my college.

content.Placements: 1. 77% of students got placed. 2. The highest package is 1.2 cr, and the lowest is 30 LPA. 3. TCS, Juspay, Tech Mahindra, Trip Factory, and Bristlecone are the top recruiters. 4. 60–70% of students will get placed in different companies 5. Data analyst, software developer, sales executive, etc. are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good; the campus is large, you can spend time anywhere on campus, the canteen is good, Wi-Fi is available on each floor, and the library is well-maintained. The hostel has good and better infrastructure. Rooms are spacious, with three members in each room. Wi-Fi is also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with placements.

content.Placements: In our college, around 60% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies like SLX, Amazon, etc., visit our campus. Students with a CGPA of around 7-10 are easily getting internships. The top role offered is an associate trainee.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Labs are well-maintained. Digital classrooms are available. Projectors are available in classrooms. Classrooms are under CCTV surveillance.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the placements and the infrastructure.

content.Placements: A maximum number of students are placed from our course, the maximum package is about 10 LPA and the average package is about 4 LPA, and the top recruiting companies for our course are Wipro, Infosys, etc. About 70 to 80 percent of students got internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are well and good in our course, they provide Wi-Fi, labs, a library, spacious classrooms, and smart classes. There are good sports facilities, canteens, and mess, the food is okay and there is a medical facility available at any time during college hours, the quality of hostel facilities is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college for learning with a good environment.

content.Placements: The majority of students get placed in computer Science and engineering. This year our seniors were offered 10L the highest package and 3LPA the lowest package. Top companies do visit our college like Wipro, Infosys, etc. I think around 90% of students got placed in our branch.
content.Infrastructure: College is pretty good. Infrastructure is also good with a quite large campus area. Cleanliness and hygiene are maintained. Faculty members are very helpful, the college has a good teaching staff. Library, labs, and classroom facilities are available. The college canteen serves good food. The only problem is hostel food. It has a boring menu.

hostel_campus.college_name: East West Group Of Institutions

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and campus.
reviews.review_text: I am pursuing a computer science engineering course that is good, and the faculty members are good and friendly. The infrastructure of the college is amazing; it has 6 floors, each floor for each department. On the last floor, there is the MCA Boys Hostel, which has good food quality and average-sized rooms.

reviews.review_heading: My Engineering Story at my college.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is very good; the campus is large, you can spend time anywhere on campus, the canteen is good, Wi-Fi is available on each floor, and the library is well-maintained.
The hostel has good and better infrastructure. Rooms are spacious, with three members in each room. Wi-Fi is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Labs are well-maintained. Digital classrooms are available. Projectors are available in classrooms. Classrooms are under CCTV surveillance.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placements and the infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are well and good in our course, they provide Wi-Fi, labs, a library, spacious classrooms, and smart classes. There are good sports facilities, canteens, and mess, the food is okay and there is a medical facility available at any time during college hours, the quality of hostel facilities is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for learning with a good environment.
reviews.review_text: College is pretty good. Infrastructure is also good with a quite large campus area. Cleanliness and hygiene are maintained. Faculty members are very helpful, the college has a good teaching staff. Library, labs, and classroom facilities are available. The college canteen serves good food. The only problem is hostel food. It has a boring menu.

reviews.review_heading: This is an average college with a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is pretty much good. It has nice rooms. Food in the hostel is as per the menu which includes both North-Indian and South-Indian. For Nepal students, it has a separate building only. External expense is Rs.7000 - Rs.10000 per month.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good atmosphere and a lot of opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Everything about this campus is too good, and you will enjoy college life very well. College is having a huge ground, basketball court, indoor badminton court, etc. Canteen is also good. You have 2 canteens, and there is also a burger point.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good academics but does not organise many fests and events.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is good. The lab and computer systems are well maintained. Our college canteen has a boring menu, and the environment is not very good there. The hostel and its rooms are nice, but the food served is not at all good. Overall, the facilities are decent here and not very good.

reviews.review_heading: Located not in so much centre of the city has a decent campus & gives a lot of learning opportunity.
reviews.review_text:
Great auditorium for cultural activities. A dedicated sports ground only for cricket. Canteen serves good food. Lab has great equipment. There is a pharmacy inside the college. 
Great parking space. Wi-Fi facilities provided for the students for their benefits. Boys hostel was inside the campus while for girls it was outside the campus within a 200 metre radius. Library provides all the latest edition of textbooks, prescribed textbooks, journals and notes.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is newly opened.
reviews.review_text: East West Group of Institutions are from the past 50 years who are celebrating the golden jubilee. The institute is located beside the Magdi road. They are starting a new branch at Yelahanka NES Office area. The institute has five departments.

reviews.review_heading: The college is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi connectivity here, and it has updated computer labs. There are first-aid medical facilities. There will be 2 sports period every week, but there are no campus games. Students can play other games such as volleyball, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure, faculty and campus are satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The campus is huge with the availability of all facilities. There are a park, a canteen and fast-food points. I would rate the campus 8 out of 10. A stationary is available on the campus. A good parking system is available, and it's very safe. Around 5 to 6 courses are taught in one block.

reviews.review_heading: A place, where the student's knowledge and life begins.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the infrastructure of my college, it has all the facilities like Wi-Fi, ground, canteen, campus, bank, parking space, and much more. These are well-designed, which feels comfortable for day to day activities in college. There is a well-designed seminar hall too on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: A review about East West Group Of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: The college has one building which was built years ago. There are separate buildings for each course. The buildings are old and lack of infrastructure. There is a lift in the main building, but it is restricted to the teaching staff. The labs don't have proper infrastructure. The college is old and out of scope.

reviews.review_heading: Good, but can improve very much to the better extent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not too great. When I got admitted to the college, there was no canteen, but still, the canteen is just in a small room. Our college has no auditorium and no sports room. Wi-Fi is not available in the college. The library is good, but not best because most of the time textbooks are not available. The labs are good for computer and mechanical, and the electrical lab instrument is less available to the students.

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like IBM, Accenture, Infosys, Juspay, etc., visit our college for placements.

college_info.intro:
St. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology, Thanjavur offers BTech and MBA as a popular programme in full-time mode. SJCET Thanjavur BTech is offered in various specialisations such as:
SJCET Kerela offers a Master of Business Administration (MBA) with an annual intake of 60 students. Whereas, for BTech, the Institute offers an annual intake of 350+ students for all the specialisations combined. SJCET Thanjavur fee structure includes tuition fees ranging from INR 35 K to INR 2 Lakh for MBA and BTech. Admission to these courses is based on entrance and candidates must meet the eligibility criteria for the same. For more details around SJCET Thanjavur popular programmes, check out the table below:

admission_process.title: St. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: St. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technologyadmission 2025is currently open for various courses. The college offers BE/BTech and MBA courses at the UG and PG level. To get admitted toSJCET, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process at St. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology is conducted online. SJCET is affiliated withAnna University. Read the following article to know more aboutSt. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technologycourse admission2025.

SJCET courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores or merit. A total of seven courses (including specialisations) are offered in the Engineering and Management stream. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularSt. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology courses:
Class 12 with a 50% aggregate with PCM (45%-40% relaxation for the backward and most backward category)
Graduation with a 50% aggregate (45% for the reserved category)

St. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology admissionsare entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at St. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: St. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates must visit the official website (https://sjcettnj.edu.in) to fill out the application form for course admission at St. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology.
STEP 2: Selection
Candidates are selected based on merit + TNEA counselling and TANCET score. The selection criteria for BTech course is based on merit + TNEA counselling and TANCET for MBA course.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release ofSt. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats as per course. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSt. Joseph's College of Engineering and Technology feeto confirm their seats in the university.

The following are the MEASI Institute of Management's popular programmes.

overview_faqs.question: Why choose MEASI Institute of Management?
overview_faqs.answer: MEASI Institute of Management is a leading B-school in India and offer quality education to the students. The institute focuses on innovative teaching methods and a curriculum. The institute offers PG and PhD courses across the Management streams. MIM has a dedicated placement cell. The placement cell prepares the students with case studies, real-life projects, group discussions, interactions with industry experts and alumni.

review_summary.college_name: MEASI Institute of Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The MBA program of this college is great.

content.Placements: The college placement cell is highly active. Around 80 percent of students get placement from this college. The average salary goes to 4–5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Axis Bank, Wipro, HDFC, and TCS. Many students get internship programme's from this college. Our seniors also get very good opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this institute is well furnished and properly maintained. Facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, classrooms, and a library are provided by the college. The canteen food is very tasty. Many types of sports facilities are available here. Medical support is always present.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has good placements, supportive faculty, and good infrastructure for students.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students are placed with a salary package of 3-5 Lacs. Companies like HDFC, TCS, Wipro, AXIS Bank, and many others are available for placements through college. Placements are given by top companies, and management is making sure that we get fully placed.
content.Infrastructure: The institute offers well-equipped classrooms, Wi-Fi, computer labs, and a resourceful library for students. The canteen is well maintained and the food is very hygienic. Basic medical aid and sports facilities are available. The college is well maintained with proper facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of MEASI Institute of Management.

content.Placements: 40% of students get placed, while others are not placed, because only sales roles are offered. The highest package is 21 LPA from UNIFY, and Joy Alukkas offers placements. 25% of students are placed in sales and marketing. HR and finance, which are considered good and top roles.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of the hostel facilities is good, and the food in the mess is also good. Being located in the city is very useful for going out, with nearby malls and other places easily accessible for purchasing things and others.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is good for placements and they teach you a lot of good knowledge.

content.Placements: 85% of students got placed from our college. The highest package offered is 20 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies like HDFC, TCS, and many more. All the talk shows are organized to gain knowledge in college.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is good, classrooms are clean, and library has good books to read, all the facilities are convincing as well. Wi-Fi is always good and super fast, classrooms have proper air conditioning and good furniture. I loved the college.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I rate the college 8/10.

content.Placements: Our supply and logistics branch receives less placement offers. Moonland Logistics, Flipkart, Amazon, Blue Dart Express, DHL Supply Chain are top hiring companies. One company hires a maximum of 2 candidates, so the number of students placed in good companies is very less. Most students receive internships at Moonland Logistics, Ekart. The salary ranges from 18,000 to 35,000 per month. Many students are interested in starting their own venture, which is the best idea. Most of the hiring process is online.
content.Infrastructure: The college is old, and its infrastructure reflects its age; it needs maintenance. Every floor is dedicated to a different branch of MBA, and the premises are cleaned every time. Labs are very clean, with PCs and internet available for every student. Classrooms have benches, boards, projectors, and fans. Library books are issued at the start of the semester and need to be returned at the end of the semester. There is no Wi-Fi, and no indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The hostel is for both girls and boys, and the fees are around 80,000 per year. The facilities are decent, and the food quality is good. The canteen is small but has a good menu, and the food is very tasty, but the room water service always has problems.

The institute offers PG courses for 2 years - 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MEASI Institute of Management.
reviews.review_text: The college campus felt small. The canteen did not have good infrastructure. Very few guest lectures and sports activities were conducted by management. They gave more importance to teaching than sports and other activities. We had well-equipped classrooms, Wi-Fi, and computer labs. The college had its own hostel, which felt high, but students could also opt for PG's. The college food was mostly non-veg and delicious.

reviews.review_heading: Good Placement and education.
reviews.review_text: As of infrastructure is concerned, classrooms are well-maintained. They have the best library for the students, a computer lab which has latest computers where students can learn and complete necessary assignments given by the professors. Medical attention is taken at most priority. Yearly, sports day is conducted for students with various games.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for MBA .
reviews.review_text: The facilities were good, including the library and classrooms. The Wi-Fi, calm atmosphere, and computer labs provide good training. The library has a sufficient number of books, including those necessary for study and knowledge acquisition. The classrooms are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Well-equipped campus with industry exposure, good faculty, and placement support is given.
reviews.review_text: The college offers good infrastructure for MBA students. Classrooms are spacious and air-conditioned, equipped with projectors and good seating. Wi-Fi facility is available across the campus. The library is well-stocked with management books, journals, and provides access to digital resources.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure with renovated buildings and really value for money
reviews.review_text: All class rooms are air conditioned with proper spacing . The hostel facility is quite good with good mess providing both vegetarian and not vegetarian foods. Wifi is available in the campus Canteen is also available outside the academic building inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is really a good journey traveling with this kind of good environment, people, and culture.
reviews.review_text: All facilities available on my campus help me explore knowledge and skills, like the internet, smart classrooms, labs, and more. I am not aware of the hostel as I stay off-campus, but from what I hear, it is a good place to stay, and the food is good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college. Highly recommended.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very good, with air conditioning and reliable Wi-Fi facility. There is good parking and good food available. A mosque is present for prayer, and the college has a very diverse group of people. The canteen is also available on campus. The library is well-maintained, and bathrooms are good. The computer room even has a lift facility, though students cannot use it, but it is still good. Sometimes, when you really need it, they are pretty understanding in that way.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome place to gain practical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: There are lots of facilities including smart boards, a canteen, a seminar hall, a spacious auditorium, and cozy infrastructure with dedicated staff. There is a computer lab, parking space, and delicious food is available in the canteen at all times.

reviews.review_heading: The beautiful learning phase of life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good compared to other colleges in Chennai because it has full AC rooms and smart technologies installed, which help students study more efficiently and effectively. The hostel facility is very good and not to say bad.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and a good study experience.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, library, labs, and classrooms have AC facilities. Classes are air-conditioned with high-speed Wi-Fi connections and good infrastructure. Restrooms are neat and hygienic, and clean drinking water is available. Classes are equipped with smart boards and projectors. The canteen food is very good. They conduct a sports meet every year for seniors and juniors.

overview_faqs.question: Is Indukaka Ipcowala Institute of Management, Charotar University of Science and Technology a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Indukaka Ipcowala Institute of Management, Charotar University of Science and Technology is a reputed institute for BBA, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Indukaka Ipcowala Institute of Management, Charotar University of Science and Technology has a review rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.6 on campuslife, 3.3 on placements, 4.2 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Indukaka Ipcowala Institute of Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and teaching quality.

content.Placements: The 95% placement rate is reflected in the previous batch. The highest package offered by companies is 10 LPA, and the lowest is 3.30 LPA. Companies like BMW, Byjus, Acorn, Blinkit, Kotak, etc., participate in the placements. Every student got an internship from our course, and many companies participated in this, offering roles in finance, marketing, business analysis, and HR.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are in very good condition, with free Wi-Fi, chilled water, and well-maintained labs. Classrooms are clean, and the benches and other furniture are in good condition. Each institute has its own personal library as well as a central library. The quality of the hostel is very good, and the food is delicious and well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Analytics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Business Analytics at IIIM provides valuable placements, real-world training, and exclusive support.

content.Placements: Hello aspirants, I am Hit Patel. Presently I am pursuing my last semester of BBA in Business Analytics. I got A1-Rank in 12th and was admitted to IIIM, Charusat University. If we talk about placements, there is a big scope in IIIM at Charusat. Byjus, BMW, Asian Paints, DMart, and Zydus are the major recruiters and students got at least 4 LPA to 5 LPA placements.
content.Infrastructure: First of all the environment of study is amazing and energetic with the latest technologies and modern infrastructure. It includes more than 4 canteens with high-quality food, free Wi-Fi on campus, sports ground, and indoor stadium. Libraries have more than 10,000 books of our course and general knowledge, articles, and research papers.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure and buildings are excellent, with elevator facilities available in all department

content.Placements: In BBA, the highest package ranges from 3 Lakhs to 12 Lakhs in MBA. Top recruiting companies include BMW, Burjer, etc. MBA offers top roles in marketing, finance, and human resources management. Burjer company offers internships in college.
content.Infrastructure: Our university provides Wi-Fi, AC, computer labs, library, washrooms, sports facilities, group games, and canteen with good food. There are clean washrooms, washing machines, and AC in B.Ed classrooms and auditoriums. Hostel facilities are excellent and well-maintained, ready for students with all necessary amenities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: BBA at Charusat University.

content.Placements: My institute doesn't provide placements for BBA students, but for MBA, there are placements and high package jobs. The highest package was 12.5 Lacs per year and the average package was around 4.5 Lacs a year. The top companies that visit the campus are Tata, L&T, and many more. As for myself, I got an internship at Amul with the help of college faculty members. Roles offered are in the fields of marketing, finance, and data analysis.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided by the institute include Wi-Fi throughout the campus, AC classrooms, a library for students and faculty, and high-quality computer labs. The university doesn't provide hostel facilities, but there are many hostels near the campus area. Additionally, the food, rooms, and management are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good Campus for College-life.

content.Placements: Most of the students get jobs. The seniors have the highest placement rate. The average package is nearabout 6 LPA. Some even get double of it. The role offered is mostly related to manager.
content.Infrastructure: Campus only has hostel for girls, and boys should commute. There are hostels near the college but the service they give is less for what they charge for it. The faculty members are good and communication is easy for students.
content.Faculty: Faculty, curriculum and exams are good. Exams are hard but pdf and PPTs are given by faculty members. Faculty members try to give real-life examples which can be easy to understand but most of the times, they speak English because we have international students too. You can ask the faculty to explain with different examples.

reviews.review_heading: Our college offers a good life and future opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The classrooms are big, and our building square is also very good. There are different concepts of presenting things like game zones, business labs, a big auditorium, and a library with the materials of IIM Ahmedabad is also very good. This is all I wanted to say about our college.

reviews.review_heading: IIIM is the land of lifestyles.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very modern and up-to-date. A huge auditorium, updated library, modern aged blackboard and projector screen, air-conditioners, and white boards in each classroom are available in our college. There are ample space to hang out and a business idea room with multiple games and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely very good college for study and also very low fees for who interested study in Charusat.
reviews.review_text:
In college many facility and infrastructure are available like wi-fi, computer labs, library, students query room. 
In our college hostel many students come for studies out of state and in college hostel food is very tasty and healthy. Medical facility are also available and one play ground for student.

reviews.review_heading: If you are instating to do engineering and pharmacy then you can do.
reviews.review_text: The college provides us with the library, classroom, hostel, sports, games, etc. There are events on the campus. The college has much more campus functions every year, so basically, it is good for the students for refreshment and enjoyment. The education they provide is okay, and the result we get maybe 70%.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for learning, and it is a  platform of show your internal abilities.
reviews.review_text: I2IM is a part of Charusat. And, Charusat is a fully Wi-Fi enabled campus. One best thing is the I2IM, or Charusat provides the free medical facilities during your education. Its library and other infrastructure are good than the other colleges or universities. And, food quality is also very good. They provide the transportation from four major nearest areas.

reviews.review_heading: Our college scored good results in 2018, and scored first place in GTU.
reviews.review_text: We had many laboratories, classrooms, a large library, a stadium for the sports lover and computer facilities. The entire campus was Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel was neat and clean.
